programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed, and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Valentine
programme.desc: An obstetrician tried unsuccessfully to revive a man's wife who he found covered in blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Strangest Ghost Towns

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Real Shawshank
programme.desc: An eerie prison with a dark past that became the setting of an iconic Hollywood movie and alien monoliths on a strange and remote island are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Death Star
programme.desc: A Nazi fortress that could have changed history if it was finished, an underwater graveyard of unexpected American treasures, and a network of tunnels hiding a secret history of New York were abandoned for mysterious reasons, and experts investigate why.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Killer COPO Camaro
programme.desc: Richard gets his hands dirty building a $100,000 2013 COPO Camaro from the wheels up on the VIP assembly line. Aaron ignores his request to work on a newly arrived 1930 Model A and builds his own dream vehicle instead while the Monkeys tackle the A.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Caddy Rust Bucket/ Bel-Air Beauty Part 2
programme.desc: Rust-ridden Caddy dumped, Richard gambles that the GMG crew can recoup his losses with a '60 Bel Air. Christie talks money: first with a dad who wants to punk his teenage son with a Yugo and then with Richard trying to convince him to hire his sister.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Mustang Mania
programme.desc: Aaron chances the wrath of the Big Monkey when he overrides Richard's instructions on a Mustang Fastback. After picking up a 'Holy Grail' Boss 429 Mustang in Minnesota, Richard questions Dennis' decision to buy a rustbucket Jaguar E-Class buried in snow.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Chevy Chase
programme.desc: It's a double-barreled blast of NASCAR as Richard Rawlings and the Gas Monkeys dive into stock car racing. First they turn a '52 Chevy Coupe into a fire-breathing dirt track racer and then Richard partners with NASCAR royalty.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: Secret, Secret, I've Got a Secret
programme.desc: Rebecca must impress Zied's parents, while Jeniffer is stunned to learn a secret about Tim's past. Ben meets Akinyi's family, and Darcey meets one of Tom's exes. Angela and Michael get caught up in a brawl, and Caesar receives a shocking update.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: Under Pressure
programme.desc: Caesar suffers a devastating blow. Zied's sister gives Rebecca a hard time. Avery faces pressure the night before the wedding. Tom is taken aback by Darcey's twin dynamic. Tim tries to fix things with Jeniffer and Ben is blamed for upsetting Akinyi.

programme.title: Unexpected: Can You Get Undilated?
programme.desc: Things get scary when Tyra tries to induce. Hailey is depressed when Matthew goes MIA. Anthony's family is concerned he isn't the father of Rilah's baby. Then, Caelan doesn't believe that McKayla is actually in labour.

programme.title: Unexpected: Say Bye-Bye Daddy
programme.desc: Tyra and Alex experience parenthood for the first time. Chloe isn't sure she can stay with Max. Anthony questions the paternity of Rilah's baby. Then, a dinner with McKayla and Caelan's family goes left.

programme.title: Unexpected: Does She Have My Ears?

programme.desc: It's prom season and Liz and Anna are ready to party, with dresses bought and dates lined up. Find out if it will be the romantic night they've dreamed of. Plus, Amber's turning the big 4-0 and the family devises a surprise trip to celebrate.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: We're Having SIX-tuplets
programme.desc: The Waldrops are a family from Alabama with three lively boys. Parents Courtney and Eric get the shock of their lives when Courtney becomes pregnant with sextuplets. They face a high-risk delivery and the stress of becoming parents of nine kids overnight.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: The Last Time This Happened We Had Quints!
programme.desc: With Danielle's health concerns growing, Adam reveals a huge secret which could mean she's actually pregnant. The couple's stress soars when one of the quints goes missing. Blayke opens a lemonade stand and the family is eager to help.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: OutValentined
programme.desc: Adam faces the challenge of pleasing his wife and all six of his daughters for Valentine's Day. Then, Adam and Danielle are stunned by what they learn at Hazel's doctor appointment.

programme.title: Half-Ton Killer?
programme.desc: Topping 1,000 lbs., Mayra Rosales is accused of murdering her nephew. During the three-year trial, a nationwide debate erupted over whether or not an obese person can get away with murder.

programme.title: Half-Ton Killer: Transformed
programme.desc: Mayra Rosales was one of the heaviest women in the world, embattled in one of the most publicized murder trials in history. Since her acquittal, she has begun a long journey: countless surgeries and hours of physical therapy for her second chance at life.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Stabbed in the Heart
programme.desc: A stabbing victim's heart has a hole in it and must be pumped by hand to keep him alive.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Deep Trouble
programme.desc: An off-duty ER physician diagnoses his own critical illness en route to the hospital. A visiting ER doctor is threatened while working at a remote hospital. A patient with ominous symptoms returns to the ER multiple times after a trip.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Tumor Takeover
programme.desc: Matt has a skin condition that causes tumors to grow all over his body. Yamileth hasn't pursued her dreams because of the lump on her neck. Pat is covered with dark spots from her neck to her abdomen. Jennifer has a unicorn bump on her forehead.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Kissing Cousins
programme.desc: Gypsy Annie marries her first cousin in an outrageous fox fur wedding dress. Ana follows her heart but breaks the rules in the first gay gypsy wedding.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: So I Married My Ex-Babysitter ...
programme.desc: When a young gypsy man marries his ex-babysitter, the couple adds fire to a family feud that dates back to over 30 years. Later, a progressive gypsy woman defies her traditional Romanichal mom by marrying a gorger.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Princess Fantasy
programme.desc: Crystal vies for the perfect princess Pnina dress. Kelly searches for a Grace Kelly inspired gown-in black.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Very Merry Wedding
programme.desc: Stephanie wants to kick off Christmas with a Black Friday wedding. Katie is hoping to look like an ice princess for her winter wonderland wedding. Megan is Christmas crazy but her Dad may not approve of the dress she wants for her holiday themed wedding.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like A Pro: American Classics

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like a Pro: Good Ingredients

programme.title: Giada in Italy: What Would Nonno Dino Make?

programme.title: Movie: Underworld: Rise of the Lycans

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Dinky Flip

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Thrifty vs. Glitzy
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted by friend and investor, Pete de Best. Pete has found a newer construction home in Orange, California that needs cosmetic updating and should prove to be a fast, simple flip.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Mid-century Miss
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a midcentury house in La Habra, California, that is towards the top of a hill. The margin is tight on this home so they need to get in and out quickly to maximize profits.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Boxed in Flip

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer
programme.desc: French fries are the topic of competition in a food court. The gang then starts trouble in a Burger restaurant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q spread the love as attendants in a bridal dress shop much to the dismay of the brides-to-be, and break a sacred guy-code in the process. Plus, they attempt to sway frightened focus groups with fragrance campaigns that stink.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Future
programme.desc: Unregulated food expiration dates lead to massive waste, your 401K won't be enough to support your retirement and the future is unpredictable.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Spa Day
programme.desc: Pricey detox treatments may do more harm than good, MSG's scary reputation is undeserved and the placebo effect is way more powerful than one may think.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Conspiracy Theories
programme.desc: Adam debunks the fake moon landing theory, discusses the Satanic Panic of the 1980s and reveals how to spot a false theory.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Economy
programme.desc: Adam explains why doing taxes is unnecessarily complicated, the economic numbers we hear don't reveal much, and American manufacturing can't return.

programme.title: NCIS: Past, Present and Future

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Captive
programme.desc: When Atwater disappears at the house of a convicted felon, the evidence doesn't look promising as his belongings and blood have been left behind. Intelligence rallies to rescue him before it's too late. Atwater struggles for survival.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: A gang from El Salvador infiltrates Chicago and Intelligence works with a visiting detective to put an end to the crew's brutal tactics. Antonio finds himself getting close to the Salvadorian detective Marcella Gomez but learns she has a hidden motive.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Anthem
programme.desc: A basketball star is murdered after an anti-police rally and Intelligence navigates a politically charged environment to track the killer. Woods' daughter Brianna gets tangled up in the case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Fearless
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a popular spiritual retreat when a body is found floating in a mud bath. Meanwhile, Hodges questions his marriage plans to Elisabetta.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Born to Run
programme.desc: Sydney turns to her sister Nell for help after her high school crush, Andre Martinez, is mixed up in a Russian plot to steal intelligence from the Department of Defense.

programme.title: NCIS: The Numerical Limit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Fashionable Crimes
programme.desc: A young model is raped by a renowned photographer who looks to his successful brother to make her disappear.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Assaulting Reality
programme.desc: The producers of a reality dating series make Benson and the SVU part of the show when they investigate contestant’s claims that she was raped.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Terrorized

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Imposter
programme.desc: A man tears his family apart when he uses a prominent fake identity to lure a vulnerable wife and mother to his bed. Barba argues that the evidence amounts to rape, but he's faced with a powerful defence attorney and skeptical judge.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Heightened Emotions
programme.desc: An athlete is the victim of sexual assault, but her secret double life could ruin both the case against her attacker and her Olympic future. Meanwhile, Rollins reconnects with her sister, Kim, when she is released on parole.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Rape Interrupted
programme.desc: A sergeant makes Benson choose between loyalty and duty when his son is accused of rape.

programme.desc: After finally catching a criminal known to use black magic, Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson close another successful case. However, when his killing spree continues, the legendary sleuths take up the hunt again.

programme.title: Movie: Deep Impact
programme.desc: As a comet is on a collision course with earth, humans have to prepare for their survival. They randomly select eight hundred thousand people to be saved in order to keep the human race alive.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Sister City
programme.desc: While Pride and the New Orleans team investigate a Russian sleeper agent who was involved with Abby's brother, Sebastian flies to D.C. to partner with Abby on the forensics in the case. Bishop drives through the night to deliver a package to New Orleans.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Undocumented

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Father's Day

programme.title: Charmed: Repo Manor
programme.desc: As Billie continues the search for her missing sister, the Charmed Ones are miniaturized and imprisoned in a dollhouse by a demon who hopes to channel the Power of Three and kill the Demonic Master Clan that has enslaved his demon tribe.

programme.title: Charmed: 12 Angry Zen
programme.desc: A monk teaches Billie how to harness her power of projection to find her sister. Elsewhere, Phoebe throws a housewarming party that gets out of control and Paige introduces Henry to the world of magic by taking him on an 'orb-along.'

programme.title: Charmed: The Last Temptation of Christy
programme.desc: Henry tries to immerse himself in Paige's magical world. Piper runs into her old flame and wonders if she is ready to put Leo's death behind her. Meanwhile, Billie finds her sister, Christy, who has been held captive by demons for several years.

programme.title: Charmed: Engaged and Confused
programme.desc: Piper organizes and engagement party for Paige and Henry, but the wedding is put in jeopardy when the couple begins to get cold feet. Meanwhile, a demon kidnaps Christy in order to lure The Charmed Ones into attacking the Triad.

programme.title: Supernatural: Dream a Little Dream of Me
programme.desc: Sam and Dean discover that Bobby's coma was caused by poison that makes him battle with his own demons that later reveals the reason he became a hunter in the first place.

programme.title: Supernatural: Mystery Spot
programme.desc: While investigating a disappearance, Dean gets shot and Sam keeps re-living the previous day to prevent Dean's death.

programme.title: Supernatural: Jus In Bello
programme.desc: Sam and Dean are arrested after attempting to break into Bela's apartment in search of the Colt. Meanwhile, from behind bars, the boys must banish a demon that has possessed Agent Henricksen.

programme.title: Bones: The Bone That Blew
programme.desc: Brennan and Booth investigate when skeletal remains are found in a tree in a protected wooded area. They follow the trail to an elite private school and a group of rich powerful families who are living in a world of lies and deception.

programme.title: Bones: Double Trouble in the Panhandle
programme.desc: Booth and Brennan infiltrate the big top when circus performers and conjoined twins Jenny and Julie are found dead and buried in a remote desert.

programme.title: Bones: Fire in the Ice
programme.desc: Booth and Brennan investigate a murder when a father and son find a frozen body in a pond while ice fishing. Booth suddenly becomes a prime suspect when the man is identified as a rival hockey player Booth fought with during a recent game.

programme.title: Bones: The Hero in the Hold
programme.desc: Brennan and the team receive a phone call from the Grave Digger informing them that Booth has been buried alive with only 24 hours worth of oxygen. The Grave Digger threatens to leave him to die unless Brennan brings the missing evidence.

programme.title: American Dad!: Rough Trade
programme.desc: After Stan and Roger have a rough day they get into a fight that leads to a Freaky-Friday type switch where they get a taste of life in the other's shoes.

programme.title: American Dad!: Finances With Wolves
programme.desc: After receiving a bonus from work, Stan buys extravagant gadgets. Meanwhile, Francine pleads for her dream kiosk. Upset about Stan's lack of support, Francine opens a muffin shop without his approval and gives Stan a taste of life without a housewife.

programme.title: Family Guy: You Can't Do That on Television, Peter
programme.desc: After Peter's favourite children's television show gets cancelled, he decides to create and star in his own show for kids.

programme.title: Family Guy: Mr. and Mrs. Stewie
programme.desc: Stewie becomes smitten when he meets a girl who is the female version of himself. Meanwhile, Peter and Quagmire take their friendship to a new level.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory: The Fish Guts Displacement
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to nurse a sick Amy back to health, while Wolowitz prepares for an upcoming fishing trip with his father-in-law.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory: The Cohabitation Experimentation
programme.desc: When Amy's apartment floods, she proposes a 'cohabitation experiment' with Sheldon. Also, Howard and Bernadette are upset when Koothrappali learns the gender of the baby before they do.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory: The Hot Tub Contamination
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny must separate a quarreling Sheldon and Amy when their co-habitation does not go as planned. Also, Howard and Bernadette find unexpected guests at their home when they decide to stay home from a planned vacation away.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory: The Fetal Kick Catalyst
programme.desc: Penny is surprised to learn she has fans of her performances in 'Serial Ape-ist' when she attends Van Nuys Comic Con with Leonard. Also, Amy hosts a Sheldon-style brunch at Penny's apartment and Wolowitz makes an impulsive purchase.

programme.title: Chasing the Cure
programme.desc: Anchored by Ann Curry, a weekly broadcast to fully harness the power of crowdsourcing in an effort to help people who are suffering from undiagnosed, misdiagnosed, or uncured medial mysteries.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory: The Veracity Elasticity
programme.desc: In order to continue living with Sheldon, Amy lies to him about repairs being made to her apartment and they host an 'on location' episode of 'Fun With Flags' in Penny's apartment. Also, Leonard lets Penny decorate Sheldon's old room.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory: The Brain Bowl Incubation
programme.desc: After successfully experimenting with combining their genes, Sheldon will stop at nothing to convince Amy they should procreate. Also, Koothrappali is embarrassed to tell the gang what the new woman he's dating does for a living.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Swedes

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: USPIS

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Lockdown

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Attack of the Killer Apartment

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Partnership Hits the Fan
programme.desc: When a law firm courting Randy for a job invites him and Max to dinner at a hip new restaurant, the evening veers off course when their eclectic cuisine doesn't sit well with Max.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the 10 Inches

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Big Gamble
programme.desc: Max and Caroline discover Han is in hot water with a gang after he amasses a substantial debt from gambling on women's tennis and can't repay it.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Two Openings - Part One and Two

programme.desc: Chandler gets a strange new roommate and Phoebe gets the chance to record 'Smelly Cat.'

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Third From the Sun
programme.desc: Aware of an impending nuclear war, a scientist and pilot conspire to leave the planet.

programme.title: Van Helsing: Super Unknown
programme.desc: To find its totem, the First Elder brings Vanessa, Scarlett and Axel to an abandoned insane asylum protected by powerful vampires, where they discover the legacy of a long dead Van Helsing relative.

programme.title: Van Helsing: I, Awake
programme.desc: Vanessa relives the memories of her ancestor, Lily Van Helsing, in Colonial Hong Kong. There, she learns to control her dark side and fights the B'ah, the second vampire Elder.

programme.title: Van Helsing: Rusty Cage
programme.desc: Sam comes to realize his dark destiny and tries to groom Mohamad to be a worthy partner. Scab and Ivory are bestowed Daywalker powers and return home to find the Sisterhood in ruins.

programme.title: Van Helsing: Pretty Noose
programme.desc: In San Francisco, Vanessa, Scarlett and Axel find and battle against the Second Elder's forces. In Denver, Flesh, Doc, Julius and Jolene rejoin American civilization as best they can.

programme.title: Van Helsing: Like Suicide
programme.desc: Vanessa has a final showdown with the Second Elder in San Francisco. In Denver, Flesh, Doc, Julius and Jolene learn that even in a Safe-Zone, life isn't easy.

programme.title: Movie: Everly
programme.desc: A crime boss puts a hit out on a call girl in his employ, but taking her down isn't as easy as he thinks. She fends off one attacker after another as she tries to contact her estranged mother and daughter to get them out of harm's way.

programme.title: Movie: Underworld: Rise of the Lycans
programme.desc: Lucian, a young Lycan, becomes a powerful leader among the slave Lycans. He plans a rebellion against the vampires' rule with the support of his secret lover and vampire, Sonja.

programme.title: Movie: Underworld: Awakening
programme.desc: Humans wage war against Vampire and Lycan clans after learning of their existence.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer
programme.desc: French fries are the topic of competition in a food court. The gang then starts trouble in a Burger restaurant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q spread the love as attendants in a bridal dress shop much to the dismay of the brides-to-be, and break a sacred guy-code in the process. Plus, they attempt to sway frightened focus groups with fragrance campaigns that stink.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Future
programme.desc: Unregulated food expiration dates lead to massive waste, your 401K won't be enough to support your retirement and the future is unpredictable.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Spa Day
programme.desc: Pricey detox treatments may do more harm than good, MSG's scary reputation is undeserved and the placebo effect is way more powerful than one may think.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Conspiracy Theories
programme.desc: Adam debunks the fake moon landing theory, discusses the Satanic Panic of the 1980s and reveals how to spot a false theory.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Economy
programme.desc: Adam explains why doing taxes is unnecessarily complicated, the economic numbers we hear don't reveal much, and American manufacturing can't return.

programme.desc: A secret confession is revealed in permanent ink and things will never be the same for this mama's boy. Two best friends compete for the HBIC title while tearing their lifelong friendship to shreds, literally.

programme.title: How Far Is Tattoo Far?: Pick Up Your Baggage
programme.desc: Exes come to the studio hoping for reconciliation but a painful reminder erupts in an all-out ink war. A girlfriend tries to lockdown her man for life with a tattoo he'll never be able to forget, but an ultimatum might throw a wrench in her plans.

programme.desc: Angelina gets herself in a slippery situation, the roomies get a call from Mike, and Ronnie's relationship isn't as good as it seems.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kailani and Sam
programme.desc: Kailani has fallen for Sam, her gay friend's online ex-boyfriend. Sam claims to love Kailani, but has been dodgy since she has tried to meet up with him. Nev and Max investigate Sam to help Kailani uncover what he is hiding.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Alyssa and Tyler
programme.desc: After being encouraged to sign up for an online dating site by her friend, Mary, Alyssa believed she had found her true love, Tyler. As Nev and Max delve into the mystery of who exactly Tyler is, it seems possible that Mary, may in fact, be Tyler.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Ari and Lanum

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Deven and James

programme.desc: Two rescued sea lions arrive at the aquarium, and trainers help prepare them for an upcoming eye surgery. The team travels to the Bahamas to research the effects of plastics in the ocean on sharks. The aquarium conducts a study to help wild beluga whales.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Did Aliens Nuke Mars?
programme.desc: Experts investigate if an extraterrestrial Armageddon transformed Mars into the wasteland we know today, after a strange discovery by the Curiosity rover suggests the Red Planet was home to an alien nuclear war 300 million years ago.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Planet of the Metal Aliens
programme.desc: After a strange discovery confirms that life is possible on its surface, scientists begin to investigate if a nearby exoplanet could be home to an alien civilization.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sea Fortress of Doom
programme.desc: A terrifying sea fortress, a highway in the Amazon that suddenly vanishes, and a mysterious structure in the shadow of the Statue of Liberty are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Arctic Hell Pit
programme.desc: Traces of a Russian hole to hell in the Arctic, a military base in America's Wild West, and a strange looming tower are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: War on the Amazon
programme.desc: A remote island on the Amazon is the site of an alleged alien attack, and a team of experts use the latest tech and first-hand testimony to investigate what really happened during this sinister incident.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: War on the Amazon
programme.desc: A remote island on the Amazon is the site of an alleged alien attack, and a team of experts use the latest tech and first-hand testimony to investigate what really happened during this sinister incident.

programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Arctic Hell Pit
programme.desc: Traces of a Russian hole to hell in the Arctic, a military base in America's Wild West, and a strange looming tower are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Message
programme.desc: Take a look at what might really happen if we got a message from space. Scientists and sci-fi writers, with cooperation from SETI and Carl Sagan's son, Nick, unravel the impact of this world changing event.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Arrival
programme.desc: Take a look at how humans may react when an alien spacecraft makes its way to Earth.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Beating Columbus
programme.desc: Expert archaeologists investigate the first confirmed Viking settlement in America, and using cutting-edge technology, they're making new discoveries that will change everything we know about American history.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Mystery of the Sea Raiders
programme.desc: Experts investigate a mysterious set of clues that suggest the Vikings could have ventured deeper into North America, and using cutting-edge tech, they put Viking ships to the test to reveal how far they could have gone.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: War in the New World
programme.desc: New evidence reveals that Vikings and Native Americans might have fought a thousand years ago, and using cutting-edge tech, experts put their weaponry and tactics to the test to find out who might have won.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Ghosts of the Great Lakes
programme.desc: A mysterious artifact might be evidence that Vikings reached the American Midwest, and to investigate this controversial theory, archaeologists build a Viking boat to test if their ships could manage a dangerous 1,000-mile journey over the Great Lakes.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Curse of Death Island
programme.desc: A team of expert archaeologists are hot on the trail of the legendary Viking utopia of the Americas, and clues from the ancient Sagas lead them to a mysterious, hostile island with a deadly past.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: The Alaska Enigma
programme.desc: New discoveries suggest that the Vikings of North America didn't just disappear, but might have traveled further into American than anyone ever imagined, and using the latest tech, experts put this shocking theory to the test.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Pandemic Pandemonium
programme.desc: History has taught us that when it comes to new viruses, humankind is still vulnerable, despite modern medicine. Meet people who are determined to survive the next global pandemic and the chaos that will ensue.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nostradamus
programme.desc: Nostradamus' prophecies have predicted some of the most dramatic and tragic events in history with chilling accuracy, and the worst to come. There are many among his followers who say that he was not sealing us to this fate, but warning us against it.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Biblical Armageddon
programme.desc: Discover the past and future of apocalyptic beliefs, the lengths people will go to ready for the end and the dark side of End Times prophecy.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Planet X
programme.desc: A look at the giant hidden planet with a gravitational pull so strong that it would literally cause the earth to turn upside down.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nuclear Apocalypse
programme.desc: The Cold War might be long gone, but the nuclear threat has re-emerged. Meet nuclear preparedness enthusiasts as they dig their bunkers and stockpile supplies, determined to survive a threat that could become a global apocalypse.

programme.title: Crime 360: Ashes to Ashes
programme.desc: Cutting edge forensics are used to solve the case of a missing man who is believed to have been murdered by two brothers.

programme.title: City Confidential: Bad News in Battle Creek
programme.desc: Residents of a peaceful Michigan city are shocked when a local TV anchorwoman is murdered.

programme.title: City Confidential: Boston: Betrayal in Beantown
programme.desc: When the Boston police are fooled into believing a black man killed a pregnant white woman, the city is the scene of strong racism.

programme.title: City Confidential: Carthage: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: The residents of a Texas town are stunned when a well-liked citizen is accused of murder.

programme.title: American Justice: Cops on Trial
programme.desc: Police officers and the general public are held to different standards of justice.

programme.title: American Justice: Body of Evidence: The Tom Capano Trial
programme.desc: Prosecutor Thomas Capano was sentenced to death for murdering his ex-lover.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Dark Side of the City
programme.desc: For the men and women on the Nightwatch, two things never stop: the calls and the questions. The first responders do everything they can to save the victims of several shootings, a drug overdose and more.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Family Ties
programme.desc: Family bonds and family struggles take center stage when a man approaches Robb and Bethany and asks them to help find his missing daughter whom he fears is dead. The ROC squad set up a high-profile sting to capture a group of thieves preying on Tampa.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: A Real Drag
programme.desc: After a violent boating accident, multiple agencies work to recover a boat, and possibly a body, from the murky depths of the Mississippi waters.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Geaux Speed Racers
programme.desc: The deputies are called in to bust teens illegally street racing in the bayou. Deputy Marlin Meeks is dispatched to a disturbance at an old house that is rumoured to be haunted.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bug Off
programme.desc: Deputy Tom Arnold is called down the bayou to investigate a man disturbing his neighbours.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: The Great Swamp Escape
programme.desc: When expensive shrimping nets are stolen, a swamp chase ensues in which the culprit, Deputy Thibodeaux's nephew, manages to escape.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bayou Beasts
programme.desc: Lt. Peter Guidry is dispatched to a property full of man-made booby traps, including trip wires and bear traps, and a tied-up gator acting as the property's guard dog.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Full Moon Madness
programme.desc: Detectives try to track down a gang of thieves that are preying on empty camps in the deep bayou.

programme.title: Investigative Reports: Trophy Kill: America's Poacher Wars
programme.desc: Correspondents look at the slaughter of American wildlife and the sale of animal body parts for huge profits. They investigate the killing of eagles for their feathers, black bears for their gallbladders and elk for their antlers.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Conspiracy
programme.desc: With inmate drug use at an all-time high, the Squad searches for the source of the drugs that have made their way into the prison.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Stuck
programme.desc: Two inmates suffer life-threatening stab wounds during a melee on the exercise yard that involves two rival gangs.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Almost Home
programme.desc: Gayle Isleib was shot on April 30, 1996. Police identify a co-worker, Tyronne Montgomery. Evidence is found of stalking, plans to kidnap Gayle, murder her husband and love poems to Gayle. Tyrone Montgomery was convicted of 1st degree Murder.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Roadside Murder
programme.desc: Theresa Wesolowski was murdered on May 29, 1999, leaving police baffled for nearly 10 years. They finally got a break in the case when a new DNA technique identified a co-worker, Mark Libecki, who was convicted of 1st degree murder in 2009.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Screaming Terror
programme.desc: Alice Hufnagle was raped and murdered on November 22. 2002. After following numerous leads and dead-ends, Police find the vital clues that lead them to Jeffery Vample, Alice's co-worker from a local Pharmacy.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Keep It In the Family
programme.desc: When these Deadly Women strike they keep it 'In The Family'.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kill the Competition
programme.desc: In the game of love the stakes are high not everyone can be a winner.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Before Vegas
programme.desc: August 7, 2000, Casey Tiner and her boyfriend TJ Steele disappear. At first, people believe they ran away. But as time passes and the young couple never reappear, their families and the police realize someone is lying.

programme.desc: These Deadly Women satisfied their blood lust within the family.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Hot and Sweet
programme.desc: When one of three people in a love triangle is found brutally murdered, the affair is exposed and a manhunt begins.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Manhattan Murder Mystery
programme.desc: Barbara Kogan is spending her fortune while her husband George scrambles to dig them out of debt by way of his mafia connections. Making matters worse, Barbara hires a hot, young publicist. It's the final straw for their marriage... and their lives.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Clash of the Tartans
programme.desc: Southern Oregon is a campers' paradise...but for one local businessman's family a weekend in the woods will become a nightmare. Open marriages and forbidden relationships will lead to someone's watery grave.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Rotten to the Core
programme.desc: The heartland of Nebraska is not immune to murderous revenge. A once-happy family is frayed by anger and jealousy when an unlikely affair is revealed, and a scandalous tattoo seals the fate of more than one member of this family.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Mommy Dearest
programme.desc: The suburbs of Detroit provide a comfortable backdrop for locals to build a life. One family though is quickly headed for disaster when affairs, lies, and explosive arguments lead someone to an early grave.

programme.title: The Face of Evil: The Grim Sleeper
programme.desc: In the late 1980's, an elusive serial killer stalks the streets of South Central Los Angeles, raping, murdering, and discarding his victims. Two decades later, clever police work and new technology puts an end to The Grim Sleeper's reign of terror.

programme.title: The Face of Evil: A Knock at the Door
programme.desc: The 1994 torture and murder of a married mother of three shakes the heartland community of Newton, Kansas to its core. And when a woman goes missing in nearby Wichita, police learn that the cases might be linked by the same sadistic killer.

programme.title: The Face of Evil: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: When a little girl disappears from a small Washington town over Fourth of July weekend, detectives look at suspects close to home. When her body is found two weeks later, forensic science and a tip leads to a trusted friend with a terrifying past.

programme.title: The Face of Evil: Burning Secrets
programme.desc: When an 80-year-old woman is murdered after leaving to running errands, Flint, Michigan investigators discover her case is tied to an unsolved drive-by shooting. Police must use science and skillful interrogation to catch a remorseless killer.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Lost Angel
programme.desc: Two distraught women call 911 when they discover their sister brutally murdered. Soon, detectives uncover a stunning surprise and struggle to find a killer whose self-hatred drove him to commit the ultimate sin, in a precedent-setting case.

programme.title: Murder Calls: No Good Deed Goes Unpunished
programme.desc: A woman calls 911, saying she's found her son unconscious in his home. When police arrive, they realize he's dead: his hands are bound and he's been strangled.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Deadlift
programme.desc: A terrified neighbour calls 911 when she witnesses a young mother gunned down in her driveway. Police work to uncover a complex conspiracy that ripped the loving mother from her three children, just to keep dark secrets hidden.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: She Made me Do It
programme.desc: As a boy, Eric Witte's father taught him to protect his family. But as his father grows increasingly violent, Eric realizes that he is the evil his family needs protection from.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Weaponology: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Masters of stealth and lords of destruction, the US Navy SEALs are the most versatile special operations force in the world. See the evolution of their cutting edge weapons and insertion techniques.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rapid Fire
programme.desc: One man, one weapon, lots of bullets. From the cumbersome but deadly Gatling gun to the lightweight, hand-held assassins of the modern battlefield, trace the men and the moments that developed the most deadly family of infantry weapons.

programme.title: Weaponology: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Centuries of technological innovation have resulted in the creation of rifles that can kill a man from 2,000 yards. The history of bullets, guns, sights, mechanisms, camouflage and tactics is revealed.

programme.title: Weaponology: Spetsnaz
programme.desc: Spetsnaz are Russia's elite fighting force. From counter terrorist strike squads to special operations experts spearheading the Red Army, these ultimate warriors strike hard and fast.

programme.title: Weaponology: French Foreign Legion
programme.desc: Gathered from the four corners of the globe, Legionnaires leave their past behind to fight for the glory of France.

programme.title: Weaponology: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Centuries of technological innovation have resulted in the creation of rifles that can kill a man from 2,000 yards. The history of bullets, guns, sights, mechanisms, camouflage and tactics is revealed.

programme.title: Weaponology: French Foreign Legion
programme.desc: Gathered from the four corners of the globe, Legionnaires leave their past behind to fight for the glory of France.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rapid Fire
programme.desc: One man, one weapon, lots of bullets. From the cumbersome but deadly Gatling gun to the lightweight, hand-held assassins of the modern battlefield, trace the men and the moments that developed the most deadly family of infantry weapons.

programme.title: Oklahoma City Bombing: As We Watched
programme.desc: America is shaken as the Oklahoma Federal Building is bombed. When Timothy McVeigh is convicted, questions surface as to why he carried out this act of terrorism.

programme.title: L.A. Riots: As We Watched
programme.desc: The LA riots of 1992 shocked the nation. It was the most deadly civil unrest in American history. Over 3000 fires were set; over 50 people died; nearly a billion dollars in property damage. For six days in 1992, the world watched as LA burned.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Sicilian Connection
programme.desc: Incensed by their treatment under Mussolini's regime and anxious to re-establish their European criminal network, a number of mafioso, including incarcerated kingpin Charles 'Lucky' Luciano, offered their full support to American intelligence officers.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Blackout Killers
programme.desc: Two serial killers take advantage of the blackouts in Nazi Germany and Britain that were meant to defend against enemy bombing.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Nazi Jewel Heist
programme.desc: When the U.S. military takes over the German Kronberg Castle in 1945, a scandalous affair between a U.S. Army Captain and Air Force Officer ensues, resulting in one of the most elaborate treasure heists of all time.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Zoot Suit Riots
programme.desc: In pre-war America street gangs were on the rise. California media stirred up panic about young Mexicans and Latinos. When WWII began, racial tensions increased and they were quickly portrayed as a significant threat, leading to a racial boiling point.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Godfather of London
programme.desc: Billy Hill was the most powerful Kingpin in Britain's post-war underworld, but the secret behind Hill's empire is little known.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Demon Doctor
programme.desc: Known for his dubious medical practices and shady financial deals, the Nazi occupation liberated Dr. Marcel Petio's murderous instincts, enabling him to embark on a shocking killing spree.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Roll the Dice
programme.desc: With 41 arrests and no convictions, Philip Williams had no worries that stabbing his ex in a parking lot would give him any trouble. But when he became a wanted man, he hit the road. Surviving on his gambling wins, Williams kept on the move.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Dinky Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a small and outdated property in Downey, California, that has potential to be a fast, cosmetic flip. Tarek believes the reward will outweigh the risk, but as renovations begin, problems and disagreements arise.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Thrifty vs. Glitzy
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted by friend and investor, Pete de Best. Pete has found a newer construction home in Orange, California that needs cosmetic updating and should prove to be a fast, simple flip.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Mid-century Miss
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a midcentury house in La Habra, California, that is towards the top of a hill. The margin is tight on this home so they need to get in and out quickly to maximize profits.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Substitute Flip
programme.desc: Tarek gets contacted by his friend Pete DeBest who wants to go 50/50 on a smoking deal on a house in La Habra, California, as with the new addition of baby Brayden to the family, they have their hands full.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Boxed in Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina scope out a house in Fullerton, California that's in a good neighborhood and shows potential for profit.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Million Dollar Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find short a sale listing for a large home in upscale neighbourhood. With asking price below a million dollars, this would be the most expensive flip they have taken on.

programme.title: Stager Things: Small Investment, Big Payday
programme.desc: Becca and Joe help a young couple who need to sell their house for a big return to cover the down payment on a new build. Then, Becca helps a growing family renovate and stage their home to up their profits so they can buy a bigger place.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Infested Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina land on a small three-bedroom, two-bathroom home that needs a lot of work in Santa Ana, California. While deciding how to rehab the home, they clash over style so decide to compete to see who has the better design.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Money Mirage
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take a gamble on a tri-level house in Irvine, CA, buying it sight unseen. The neighborhood is hot, but the house needs a lot of work.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: It's a Dump
programme.desc: Flipping team Tarek and Christina purchase and flip dilapidated properties.

programme.title: House Hunters: Ageless Charm or Turnkey in Alabama
programme.desc: Two lawyers are starting their careers and their lives together in Montgomery, Alabama. He wants a house with timeless charm, while she makes a case for the practicality of newer and turnkey.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Reclaiming Time, Italian-Style
programme.desc: An interior designer wants to move to Frosinone, Italy for a break from her hectic life. Although she's got a clear idea of what she wants, most homes in this Italian province don't meet the modern standards she's used to.

programme.title: House Hunters: Budget Battle in Palm Springs
programme.desc: West Hollywood buyers are looking for a weekend retreat in Palm Springs, California. One wants a lush yard for entertaining, and the other wants room for visiting family. However, when it comes to the budget, they have different ideas.

programme.desc: Grace uses a couple's courtship as inspiration as she transforms a dated 1960s home. Her signature design touches include personalized wallpaper and a custom backsplash sign that highlights their love for one another and their rich family history.

programme.desc: Page and DeRon buy a cozy North Nashville cottage that stretches the definition of a 'third bedroom.' The pair devise some ingenious renovations to make this incredibly tiny house feel huge, however they encounter some major roadblocks along the way.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Nashville: Monster House
programme.desc: Page and DeRon purchase a cute two-bedroom, one-bath cottage in the historic Inglewood area. They hope to make it an easy flip, but the house turns out to be nothing but trouble for them.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Nashville: Hold the Door
programme.desc: Page finds a three-bedroom house on a huge corner lot in the heart of Donelson, but the interior of the rambling ranch is cramped and confusing.

programme.title: Love It or List It, Too: Cosmic Commute
programme.desc: Although accountant Dan is fed up with a huge house and long commute, Heather's not ready to give up on their new impulse-bought home just yet.

programme.title: Love It or List It, Too: Functionality With a View
programme.desc: When Linda and Dan visited a charming bed and breakfast with lush gardens and stunning lake views, they could not have predicted it would one day be their home. Linda has buyer's remorse after realizing the house lacks functionality.

programme.title: Love It or List It, Too: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Lisa and Chad were off to a good start when they found a large house in a park-like setting, but the long hours and big money they spent renovating the top floor have taken their toll. She's ready to finish the basement, but he wants something easier.

programme.title: Love It or List It, Too: Open Concept or Empty Nest
programme.desc: A house that seemed like a great idea years ago has never really lived up to the initial hype. With the kids fully grown, he thinks they can renovate their way into the open-concept floor plan she craves, while she thinks it is too much of a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters: Writers Go Tiny on the Road
programme.desc: Married Maryland freelance writers have moved out of their three-bedroom apartment to simplify, go mobile and go tiny.

programme.title: House Hunters: Engaged in a Debate Between Lofts or Brownstones in Chicago
programme.desc: Megan and Todd want to buy their first home before they start wedding planning.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Bickering in Colombia
programme.desc: A couple well-known as the 'Bickersons' due to their back-and-forth quips hopes for a home in Medellin, Colombia. Their contrasting tastes and desires have the pair battling to find enough space and the specs to meet both of their needs.

programme.title: House Hunters: Jerry and Emily Move From Florida to Chattanooga
programme.desc: Jerry and Emily are moving to Chattanooga, but they don't agree on how much to spend. Her budget tops out at $250,000 so they can pay off the house in 15 years. He's willing to go up to $350,000 if it gets them everything they want.

programme.title: House Hunters: Midcentury Glam in Chico, Ca
programme.desc: A couple looks for a home with some midcentury glam in Chico, CA. The interior designer of the two wants a fixer-upper he can put his stamp on, but the other is laser-focused on finding a home that comes with a pool.

programme.title: House Hunters International: A Crawley Country Mile
programme.desc: American Grace and Londoner Kris have had a whirlwind long-distance relationship. Now they're married and moving to quiet Crawley, England, to start a life together.

programme.title: House Hunters: Rolling Hills of Paradise in Lehigh County, Pennsylvania
programme.desc: It's a battle of nature versus nurture as he wants acres and acres of rolling hills and she wants the community of a tightknit suburban neighborhood.

programme.title: House Hunters: Family of Six Upsizing in Greenville, South Carolina
programme.desc: A Greenville, South Carolina, family of six is looking to move up from their small townhouse into something bigger. But while she wants to put their own stamp on a fixer-upper, he'd much rather keep it simple with a move-in ready home.

programme.title: House Hunters International: A Fresh Start in Costa Rica
programme.desc: Now that her children are grown, a newly single woman from Reno, Nevada, is ready for a fresh start and is leaving the 9-5 work grind behind. She's looking for her dream home in the beach town of Montezuma, Costa Rica.

programme.title: House Hunters: Vacation Home Hunt in Tahoe
programme.desc: A young family of three searches for a home in Tahoe, CA. He's looking for an A-Frame with lots of room to entertain within walking distance of town. She wants a secluded cabin with a rustic feel for some peace and quiet.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Treehouse Point 2.0
programme.desc: Pete and his family gear up to expand their treehouse empire on 23 acres of forest wonderland. As construction kicks off, Pete enlists his son Charlie to oversee the project and builds an incredible treehouse home base for him to live in fulltime.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Magical Party Pad
programme.desc: Pete heads to the Platte River Valley of eastern Nebraska to build a magical, towering treetop castle for a family that has decided to never grow up.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Green With Envy
programme.desc: Lucas and the crew have their work cut out for them as a client's demands leave him reluctant. A Caribbean destination that includes green rocks and a sand bottom salt-water pool is the client's request.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Dream Mulligan
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with a challenging project: repair and remodel an unusable pool for a famous golfing family. Puzzled as to how this pool was even built, Lucas creates an ocean-themed pool with fire features, an infinity edge and his first water couch.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: From Mild to Wild
programme.desc: Lucas delivers the most epic pool he's ever built. Put to the ultimate test, he transforms an ordinary backyard into two different pools complete with an 8.5ft high spa, his first fire feature inside a grotto and a treehouse with a theme park sized slide.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Ultimate Backyard Paradises
programme.desc: After transforming more than 150 backyards into paradise, Lucas is revisiting five of his favourite builds and families. Lucas and his team reveal their never-before-seen, most outrageous backyard creations.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: From Mild to Wild
programme.desc: Lucas delivers the most epic pool he's ever built. Put to the ultimate test, he transforms an ordinary backyard into two different pools complete with an 8.5ft high spa, his first fire feature inside a grotto and a treehouse with a theme park sized slide.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Ultimate Backyard Paradises
programme.desc: After transforming more than 150 backyards into paradise, Lucas is revisiting five of his favourite builds and families. Lucas and his team reveal their never-before-seen, most outrageous backyard creations.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Dream Mulligan
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with a challenging project: repair and remodel an unusable pool for a famous golfing family. Puzzled as to how this pool was even built, Lucas creates an ocean-themed pool with fire features, an infinity edge and his first water couch.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Rescue My Renovation: Coping With a Con Man
programme.desc: A young couple is out of their bedroom because of water damage, leaks, and mold. John DeSilvia must fix the roof and give this couple an extra something to make up for the first year in their new home.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Alaska Flip N Move: Barn Top vs. Container Cabin
programme.desc: Flipping friends Bob and Jubal take the empty top half of an old barn and turn it into a modern, open-concept living space. Meanwhile, the Merricks get a bargain on a shipping container, but they have to move it down an icy mountain road.

programme.title: Buyers Bootcamp With Scott McGillivray: Battle of the Beachside Bungalows
programme.desc: Scott McGillivray debates partnering with an eager couple new to flipping and another couple stuck in a mid-flip crisis. With two great houses full of value adding possibilities at his fingertips, Scott is confident that he can't make a wrong choice.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Tale of Two Houses
programme.desc: Nicole is back in action and juggling two Detroit houses at the same time. While the Ferndale house is in great shape, the 14 Mile property is gutted of its original fixtures and charm. Ferndale serves as the inspiration for renovations at 14 Mile.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Close Quarters
programme.desc: Nicole tackles a 1920s house that used to be a rental and has incredibly small upstairs bedrooms. She plans to change the layout and add character, including removing a wall to make room for a new hallway and custom linen closet.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Bath Miracle
programme.desc: Nicole finds that turning a tiny, dated bathroom into an en suite master bath isn't easy as she struggles to fit a soaking tub, shower and custom vanity in the space to give it stately, historic appeal.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Maximizing the Master Suite
programme.desc: Nicole has almost completed the upstairs in her 14-Mile house. Now it's to time to unveil a bigger and brighter master bedroom. To get the look she wants, she has to knock down some walls, open up the ceiling and bring in a very special feature.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Matching Game
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis continues work on the den and powder room of her 1920s 14-Mile house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Basement Blues
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis ventures down into the creepy basement of her 14-Mile project. She's then faced with a dilemma when an unforeseen turn of events threatens the entire project.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Cooking Up the Kitchen
programme.desc: Nicole begins construction in the kitchen of the 14 Mile house. Working with a limited space and no original details, she is forced to attempt something she has never done before: an open kitchen.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Adding Style to 14 Mile
programme.desc: As the renovation of the 14 Mile house winds down, there's one more thing that needs to be done: finish the exterior. After repairing damage from a car accident, Nicole has a chance to bring back original details the house lost decades ago.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Stepping Up the Living Room
programme.desc: Nicole turns her attention to a rundown cottage in need of major rejuvenation in Lake Orion, Michigan. Starting with the living room, she rips out an old staircase and uses an old door to tie the rooms together, making the space look grand.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Laundering Around
programme.desc: Nicole is challenged to fix the back extension of the rundown cottage in Lake Orion, Michigan. The space is too small to be a garage, so she comes up with a plan to fit laundry, a bathroom and an inviting entryway into this small area.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: All Hands On Shed
programme.desc: The backyard of the Lake Orion, Michigan, cottage is underutilized, so Nicole Curtis decides to turn this eyesore into a peaceful hangout.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Reshaping the Master Bath
programme.desc: With a limited amount of space in the Lake Orion house, Nicole Curtis decides that the best use of the second upstairs bedroom is to transform it into a master bathroom.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Suite of Mirrors
programme.desc: Nicole focuses her attention on the neglected master bedroom and must rethink the structure of the room to come up with a charming space the house deserves. She decides to add extra sleeping room by turning the laundry room into a second bedroom.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Facing the Front Porch
programme.desc: The front of her Lake Orion, MI, house is barely accessible, and the driveway is solid dirt. Nicole sets out to reverse that by renovating the front porch and adding a Model-T style driveway. She also adds a white picket fence and heavy landscaping.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Kitchen Nightmare
programme.desc: Nicole knows that the kitchen and dining room are the heart of this home and want to make them the house's functional centerpiece. She rips out what was left behind and starts over with a new layout, cabinets and appliances.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Returning to Campbell
programme.desc: Nicole returns to her first big Detroit flip, the Campbell house, where a pipe burst and ruined the upstairs and downstairs kitchens. She decides to restore both spaces a second time using any pieces she can salvage.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Bewitching Treats
programme.desc: The seven remaining bakers make witches' fingers and toes and a sauce to dip them in, followed by desserts that look like witches with edible brooms.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: It's All in Your Head
programme.desc: The six remaining bakers work in teams to create outrageous and delicious left brain/right brain desserts then must use their most common phobias like insects and ghosts as inspiration for desserts.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Sweet Screams
programme.desc: The five remaining bakers take the cream puff to the dark side by creating 'scream puffs' and scary mask desserts.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: The Candyman Cometh
programme.desc: The four remaining bakers make desserts to taste like their favorite candy bars and face death by chocolate with a dessert that combines chocolate with odd ingredients.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Extra Spooky: Extreme Halloween
programme.desc: The three remaining bakers create an edible centerpiece that glows, three creepy treats and a final challenge of Jack-O-Lantern cakes that light up. The winning baker takes home the title of 'Halloween Baking Champion' and $25,000.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: All in the Family
programme.desc: Sassy Miami chef Mika Leon brings the heat against Atlanta chef Michael Bertozzi. Chef Carla Hall and actor Jesse Tyler Ferguson decide who has what it takes to join their modern family for a food fight against Bobby Flay.

programme.title: The Flay List: Lobster
programme.desc: Bobby and Sophie Flay are visiting their favorite spots for lobster in New York City, but they start out in SoHo for coffee and a sweet snack at Balthazar. They head to Bobby's pick, Ed's Lobster Bar, and grab a trendy, frozen snack at Kith Treats.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Chi-Town Throws Down
programme.desc: Actress Sophia Bush and Chef Carla Hall decide which Windy City chef, Aaron Cuschieri or Jill Barron, has what it takes to blow Bobby Flay out of the arena.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Chocolate Victory
programme.desc: Bobby Flay brings his A game when Mexican cuisine chef Katy Smith and Denver chef Jose Guerrero show up with talent to spare. The pressure is on for Iron Chef Michael Symon and Valerie Bertinelli to choose their contender.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: The Candyman Cometh
programme.desc: The four remaining bakers make desserts to taste like their favorite candy bars and face death by chocolate with a dessert that combines chocolate with odd ingredients.

programme.title: Mystery Diners: Tour Bust
programme.desc: Father and son team Danny and Danny Jr. own the Star Cafe and Star Coaches in Atlanta. They are concerned about missing food in their kitchen and a rise in fuel expenses on their tour buses.

programme.title: Mystery Diners: Hamburger Burglar
programme.desc: Michell and Bella, owners of Latin House in Miami, fear someone at their offsite warehouse is giving away the recipes to their award-winning burgers. Charles sends in Jamie and Estefanie to find out if there are any moles inside their organization.
