programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Lighter 16-Minute Meals
programme.desc: Ree cooks against the clock to make four of her favorite recipes over into lighter, healthier 16-minute meals.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like A Pro: Beefed Up
programme.desc: Ina Garten is setting her sights on beef and sharing her tips for preparing it roasted, ground, sliced, sauteed and seared just like a pro. She starts with the perfect steak, an easy and elegant filet mignon with mustard and mushrooms.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like A Pro: American Classics
programme.desc: Ina Garten is finding new ways to turn the volume up on American classics. She starts by combining coffee chipotle chili powder and red pepper flakes for a spicy dry rub on Grilled New York Strip Steaks.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like A Pro: Farm Stand
programme.desc: It's all about farm-to-table cooking for Ina Garten's spring feast, with a dinner, side dish, salad and dessert inspired by the farm stand. There's amazing rosemary rack of lamb with easy tzatziki and parmesan roasted zucchini.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like a Pro: Good Ingredients
programme.desc: Ina Garten shares recipes that use her favourite good ingredients starting with good chocolate in her chocolate pecan meringue torte. Next, good maple syrup and lemon are turned into sublime side dishes including maple-roasted acorn squash.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like a Pro: No Sides Required
programme.desc: Ina Garten prepares lamb shanks and orzo and smoked salmon pizza.

programme.title: Giada in Italy: What Would Nonno Dino Make?
programme.desc: Giada celebrates her grandfather Dino's love of food by creating some of his favorites.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Driving Fence Posts
programme.desc: There's a great sack lunch and a bunch of pranks in store as Ree Drummond’s family tackles a big fence post project on the ranch. She makes some strip steak sandwiches with grilled onions and over easy eggs. Plus, shortcut mini pecan pies.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Simple Meals
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes five ingredient dishes, like chicken fennel bake, Spanish baked salmon, Teriyaki pork, spaghetti carbonara, and eggs in tomatoes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Just Like Yesterday
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits some joints that feel like they've been there forever. In San Diego, an overgrown coffee shop serving chicken and dumplings for 60 years; a bar-turned-restaurant in Chicago's Little Italy, and in Atlanta, a legendary diner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real Deal Fast Food
programme.desc: Guy tracks down some great places that prove fast food can also be great food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: You Can Say That Again
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits three joints with the same name twice, such as Pok Pok, Tap Tap and Niko Nikos. He visits an old gas station in Houston, a Haitian restaurant in Miami Beach and a walk-up or dine-in place in Portland.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Who'Da Thunk It?
programme.desc: Guy visits a 50 year-old drive-in in Boise, Idaho where you can order prime rib. Then, a pizza joint in Sante Fe, N.M. where they offer green chillies as a topping. Plus, Jamaican cooking in Fort Worth, Texas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Neighborhood Favorites
programme.desc: Guy visits restaurants in Santa Fe and Salt Lake City.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Legacies
programme.desc: Guy Fieri looks into some classic restaurant favourites in America.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Deep-Fried Inferno
programme.desc: Where there's smoke, there's fire, and Noah Cappe is ready to have his taste buds fired up at the Spencerport Volunteer Firemen's Association Carnival in New York. From the Flaming Weck to the Five Alarm Fries, there's plenty of sizzle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hawaii Fried Dough
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the Aloha State for the 'Iolani Fair. This school fundraiser fair in Honolulu features Hawaiian-style fried dough in the Malasada Ice Cream Sandwich and Sweet Roll Sliders.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Serious Sandwiches
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shows off the most scrumptious and seriously stunning sandwiches ever created. These shockers prove that there are truly no limits to what can be placed between two slices of bread.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Smothered to the Max
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes in for a full day of over-the-top, smothered goodness. Indulgent in every bite, these dishes range from drool-worthy, savory and sumptuous meals to mouthwatering, sticky, sweet and syrupy desserts.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Best Meal Deal
programme.desc: You don't have to sacrifice incredible food experiences in order to save a buck. Antonia Lofaso keeps her wallet full with irresistible Mexican munchies in Venice Beach, Calif., Duff Goldman saves a ton as he takes on the enormous Orca Platter.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feast of the Middle East
programme.desc: Middle Eastern cuisine comes from more than ten countries, making it some of the most diverse and popular food on the planet.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Boise, ID
programme.desc: Casey Webb ventures to beautiful Boise, Idaho, for a sushi and soup challenge so diabolically spicy, it goes by the name of Demon's Delight.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Green Bay
programme.desc: Adam is at the NFL's opening game in Green Bay to showcase the city's best eats.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Sandwiches, Street Food and Cobbler a la Mode
programme.desc: Brad Miller heads to Portland, Ore., to visit Chef Melissa McMillan at her Pastrami Zombie food truck. She shows Brad how to make the truck's namesake sandwich, and he also tries the Cubby Cubano, a twist on the classic Cubano sandwich.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Barbecue Ribs, Cheese Melts and Cake Balls
programme.desc: Brad Miller travels to Nashville, Tenn., for hickory-smoked baby back ribs with hot, Memphis-style barbecue sauce from the Smoke Et Al food truck and owner Shane Autrey.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Toastbusters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Hunt County Fair in Greenville, Texas, and makes short work of the Smoke Bomb and the French toast crunch burger. But it's the blue bacon cheesecake that really knocks him out.

programme.title: Sugar Showdown: Wedding Cakes
programme.desc: In order to go home with the $10,000 prize, the bakers must take on cheese curds in the elimination round and a wedding theme in the cake showdown.

programme.title: Sugar Showdown: Spring Cakes
programme.desc: Three bakers compete in an elimination round using beets, two make it to the spring-themed cake showdown, and one will walk away $10,000 richer.

programme.title: Sugar Showdown: Tropical Island Cakes

programme.title: Sugar Showdown: Princess Cupcakes
programme.desc: Bakers take on figs in the elimination round and a princess theme in the $10,000 cupcake showdown.

programme.desc: Pastries with a mid-western flair; French pastries and retro American sweet treats.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Grown-up Goodies
programme.desc: In Portland, Ore., an ice cream shop adds cocktails to the mix-ins. In Healdsberg, Calif., the area's bountiful produce finds its way into hyper-seasonal cupcakes.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Childhood Favorites
programme.desc: Unique takes on childhood favourites.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Pick Me Up
programme.desc: Tandem Coffee and Bakery in Portland, Maine will brighten your day with their coconut almond cream pie and their strawberry-almond cornmeal cake.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Music Industry Cake
programme.desc: The standards for creativity and passion are high for baker Nastassja Lusengo, who's working on an extreme cake for a record producer.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Island Replica Cake
programme.desc: Cake duo Jamie and Joe are tackling their most challenging commission yet: a realistic model of the island of Santorini for a couple's wedding reception.

programme.desc: A baker designs an epic pop culture wedding cake with a massive dragon, and customers in a coffee shop are pleasantly surprised by a sweet creation with an edible mug.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Dazzling Dragon and Bear Cakes

programme.desc: Alton shows how to cook with molasses instead of sugar.

programme.title: The Dead Files: Night Terrors: Brumley, Missouri
programme.desc: Steve and Amy travel to Missouri to investigate paranormal disturbances keeping customers awake at an historic bed and breakfast. Steve's investigation reveals a surprising past involving medicine and religion, including a horrific murder-suicide.

programme.title: The Dead Files: Lost Souls

programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed, and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: A college student is found dead and the evidence suggests he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Valentine
programme.desc: An obstetrician tried unsuccessfully to revive a man's wife who he found covered in blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: A woman is found dead. A man's version of events was at variance with the evidence, so investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to determine if this was a botched robbery, or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part One: 1869-1932
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Civil War, America's south is looking to put the past behind it, and finds one path in a growing cultural passion of the north: football. In December 1932, the Southeastern Conference is officially formed.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Two: 1933-1959
programme.desc: Multiple SEC schools claim national titles from the 1930s through the 1950s. In 1958, LSU won with star running back Billy Cannon leading the way, and a year later Cannon had epic game-winning punt return against powerhouse Ole Miss.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Three: 1960-1970
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Georgia Tech leaves the conference and the civil rights movement becomes embedded in the history and image of the region. Bear Bryant, hired in 1958, becomes the face of Alabama, and of SEC football.

programme.title: Bones: The Princess and the Pear
programme.desc: When a group of students find the decomposed body of a woman wearing a medieval princess dress, the team is on the scene to investigate. With Booth incapacitated due to a back injury, Agent Payton Perotta steps in to help with the investigation.

programme.title: Bones: The Bones That Foam
programme.desc: Bungee-jumping newlyweds plunge off a bridge only to come face-to-face with a corpse lying at the bottom of a gorge. When the victim's bones begin to foam, the team has only 24 hours to investigate before the bones disintegrate all together.

programme.title: Bones: The Salt in the Wounds
programme.desc: Booth and Brennan investigate a petrified human body found buried in a mound of salt in a city de-icing truck. They discover that the victim was a pregnant 16-year-old high school volleyball player who was allegedly part of a 'pregnancy pact.'

programme.title: Movie: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: After finally catching a criminal known to use black magic, Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson close another successful case. However, when his killing spree continues, the legendary sleuths take up the hunt again.

programme.title: Movie: Sherlock Holmes: A Game of Shadows
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson team up to take down their nemesis, Professor Moriarty.

programme.title: Arrow: Sara
programme.desc: Lance calls the Arrow when another archer appears in town and starts skewering businessmen. Diggle tries to learn the other archer's identity and discovers it is a man named Simon Lacroix who goes by the code name Komodo.

programme.title: Arrow: Corto Maltese
programme.desc: Oliver decides it's time for Thea to come back to Starling City, so he packs for Corto Maltese where Felicity has traced Thea's whereabouts.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: No Man's Land
programme.desc: A mystery man saves the life of a lieutenant and then disappears from the scene. Later on, the NCIS team unravels a new case when forensic evidence suggests he is a soldier who was captured in Afghanistan years ago and never found.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Second Chances
programme.desc: After tracking stolen navy TNT to a cocaine warehouse, Special Agent Pride and the team uncover a domestic ring that is producing their own cocaine and is headed by Sonja's childhood friend.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Radio Silence
programme.desc: The team protects a local DJ from a threatening perpetrator and investigates the murder of a navy captain who was attacked while on-air with the radio show. Also, Pride's daughter, Laurel, returns home to discuss her future plans.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: If It Bleeds, It Leads
programme.desc: NCIS Special Agent Brody believes that a sailor hit by a party bus in the French Quarter is connected to her sister's death after the team discovers similarities between the two. Also, the team prepares for St. Patrick's Day festivities in New Orleans.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Means to An End
programme.desc: The NCIS team discovers a surveillance van filled with photos documenting Special Agent Pride's every move after his daughter is attacked on campus and placed in protective custody.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Second Line
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a Navy lieutenant during a French Quarter second line funeral procession, a New Orleans tradition that celebrates the recently deceased with a musical parade.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: After a navy lieutenant dies during a clandestine visit to a general's hotel room, Special Agent Pride and the team are asked to break standard protocol for the murder investigation.

programme.title: Movie: Batman & Robin
programme.desc: Masked heroes Batman, Robin and Batgirl battle Mr. Freeze and Poison Ivy when they team up to freeze Gotham City.

programme.title: Movie: Batman
programme.desc: A masked vigilante, dressed like a bat, defends Gotham City from a madman known as The Joker.

programme.title: Movie: Batman Returns
programme.desc: Batman is called upon to rescue the citizens of Gotham City from the Penguin and Catwoman.

programme.title: Movie: Predator
programme.desc: A squad of commandos dispatched on a rescue missions to the jungles of South America encounter a monstrous alien hunter that begins to target them one-by-one.

programme.title: Movie: Escape Plan
programme.desc: An expert at escaping from prison is betrayed and locked in the most secret and secure facility ever built. He and another inmate must work together to get out this time.

programme.title: Movie: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Wandering into a small town, ex-Green Beret John Rambo is targeted, arrested and abused by the local police. When he escapes, Rambo flashes back to his time as a POW and heads into the hills, armed to the teeth and ready to take on those who hunt him.

programme.title: Movie: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: Green Beret loner John Rambo is extricated from prison by his former superior Colonel Troutman for a top-secret operation to bring back PoWs still held in Vietnam. Teamed up with a female Viet freedom fighter, Rambo embarks on a reconnaissance mission.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead: Today and Tomorrow
programme.desc: An encounter with a survivor sends Al and Morgan on a mission into a dangerous settlement. There, Al chases a lead while Morgan has an epiphany. Elsewhere, Grace and Daniel make a connection.

programme.title: The Terror: Infamy: Taizo
programme.desc: A story of the past provides insight into the present evil that stalks the Terminal Islanders. Chester returns home to his family. Henry and Asako are faced with a difficult decision.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead: Pablo and Jessica
programme.desc: Alicia and Madison work to unite two competing factions. Nick draws upon skills from his past to take on a new role at the colonia.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead: Pillar of Salt
programme.desc: Madison springs into action when one of the hotel residents gets violent. Meanwhile, at the Colonia, Alejandro shows a darker side of himself.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead: Date of Death
programme.desc: Refugees flood into the hotel, including someone unexpected. Madison struggles to cope with the situation.

programme.title: The Three Stooges: Loose Loot
programme.desc: The best shorts from these American comedy icons.

programme.title: The Three Stooges: Musty Musketeers
programme.desc: The best shorts from these American comedy icons.

programme.title: The Rifleman: The Second Witness
programme.desc: Lucas has information about a murder case, but must travel to a nearby town to testify. Unfortunately, the other witness is murdered by an unknown assassin, and the townsfolk expect Lucas will meet the same fate.

programme.title: The Rifleman: The Trade
programme.desc: An outlaw in love with a woman who has a serious illness, asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward money and use it towards her medical care.

programme.title: The Rifleman: One Went to Denver
programme.desc: Lucas is unaware that an old friend who once saved his life is now a bank robber on the run.

programme.title: The Rifleman: The Deadly Wait
programme.desc: An ex-con arrives in North Fork wanting to get even with the man who sent him to jail.

programme.title: The Rifleman: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: A lawman arrives in North Fork with the intent to kill an outlaw for the reward money but seeing opportunity, he instead murders an innocent man. After collecting the bounty he blackmails the true criminal, and Lucas must step in.

programme.title: Movie: Death Race: Inferno
programme.desc: A convict is one victory away from winning freedom for himself and his pit crew in the prison's Death Race.

programme.title: Movie: Friday
programme.desc: Two friends must come up with $200, to pay drug dealer Big Worm for marijuana they smoked.

programme.title: Movie: Next Friday
programme.desc: A streetwise man visits his cousin and his uncle, who have recently won the lottery.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two hip Miami undercover detectives have 72 hours to nab the crooks who stole millions in recovered heroin from the police station.

programme.title: Movie: American Gangster
programme.desc: A detective in 1970s America works to bring down the drug empire of Frank Lucas. The kingpin from Manhattan is smuggling the drug into the country from the Far East.

programme.title: Movie: All Eyez on Me

programme.title: Movie: Valentine in the Vineyard
programme.desc: A couple continue on their journey to see the vineyard succeed. While things have been challenging at times, the pair are united in their passion to see the business succeed. Looking toward the future, a wedding might be their next big investment.

programme.title: Movie: Chance at Romance
programme.desc: A woman thinks she has met the man of her dreams online. But after she's invited to an art show in his hometown she finds out she's been communicating with the man's son and that her dream guys isn't interested in a relationship.

programme.title: Movie: With Love, Christmas
programme.desc: An ad executive and her uptight co-worker must create the ultimate Christmas commercial. To complicate things, they are also each-others Secret Santa.

programme.title: Movie: The Perfect Bride
programme.desc: A fitness instructor who runs a bridal boot camp falls in love with the fiancé of one of her new recruits.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love for Sale
programme.desc: The girls prepare for the Children's Hospital Bachelorette Auction and a reluctant Dorothy decides to participate. She is in for a quick surprise when Stan walks in and begins bidding.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: The deathbed confession of an ex-patient at Shady Pines means bad news for Sophia, since in her confession she stated that she and Sophia started the 1985 Shady Pines fire.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: Sophia can't remember the events of the evening of the 1985 Shady Pines fire and decides to jump bail and go back to Sicily. With the threat of Sophia going to jail, the girls reminisce about good times they have spent together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Henny Penny: Straight, No Chaser
programme.desc: The girls are quarantined with first-graders when they all catch the measles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Hey Look Me Over
programme.desc: The discovery of a photo of Blanche in bed with Rose's husband threatens their friendship.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Case of the Libertine Belle
programme.desc: The girls participate in a murder mystery weekend and Dorothy has a ball when she solves a mystery. However, when Blanche is accused committing a real murder, Dorothy will have to use all her keen detective skills to find the real murderer.

programme.title: Frasier: Dad Loves Sherry, the Boys Just Whine
programme.desc: After Maureen breaks up with him, Martin asks out someone he's had his eye on. Much to Frasier and Niles' horror, she is a loud, brassy banjo-playing waitress. Frasier and Niles cover up their true feelings, until Sherry takes Daphne's banquet ticket.

programme.title: Frasier: Liar, Liar
programme.desc: Martin is appalled when Frasier admits he pulled a prank in prep school and blamed it on a bully, who was expelled because of the incident. Out of guilt, Frasier tracks the man down and visits him in prison, but has trouble confessing the truth.

programme.title: Frasier: Three Days of the Condo
programme.desc: When his request to install a doorknocker is denied, Frasier challenges the condo association president, Ms. Langer, by running against her in the election.

programme.title: Frasier: Death and the Dog
programme.desc: When Eddie becomes lethargic and refuses to eat, Martin tries everything to perk him up. He hires a dog psychiatrist to determine the cause of this depression.

programme.title: Movie: The Last Bridesmaid
programme.desc: A woman is focused on taking over her family business, instead of looking for a man. All her friends are getting married and she seems to get new invitations in the mail weekly. While at a wedding, she meets a documentarian, and he changes her life.

programme.title: Movie: The Perfect Bride: Wedding Bells
programme.desc: Newly engaged Nick and Molly are looking forward to their big day. After their overbooked wedding venue reserves the wrong date, they have six weeks to plan the wedding of their dreams.

programme.title: Movie: All Things Valentine
programme.desc: A blogger with a string of disappointing Valentine's Days is ready to give up on love when she meets Brenden, a handsome veterinarian. She finds out he blames his recent break-up on her blog and he is the one leaving her angry comments.

programme.title: Movie: All of My Heart
programme.desc: When a young woman inherits half of a house, she picks up her life and moves to the country for a fresh start. The man who owns the other half wants to sell it, but over time they develop a relationship.

programme.title: Movie: A Novel Romance
programme.desc: A best-selling novelist writing under a pen name moves to Portland and unknowingly falls in love with the biggest critic of his latest book. When true identities are revealed, both must take a leap of faith.

programme.title: Movie: The Sweetest Heart
programme.desc: A woman is doing everything she can to save her cupcake business. With the help of a handsome investment banker, her luck begins to turn around.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: Cleveland gets a second chance at love when he reunites with his high school crush.

programme.desc: Roast Master Sean Hayes along with Robert De Niro, Caitlyn Jenner, Blake Griffin, Jeff Ross, Nikki Glaser and more team up to take down one of Hollywood's biggest stars.

programme.title: Good Talk with Anthony Jeselnik: David Spade
programme.desc: David Spade explains what makes stand-up more difficult today, chats about steering clear of political jokes and considers how his childhood influenced his comedy.

programme.title: South Park: Krazy Kripples
programme.desc: Believing that people who are born disabled are better than those who are disabled through an accident, Jimmy and Timmy pull together a group of people like themselves and call their new club the 'Crips.'

programme.title: South Park: You Have 0 Friends
programme.desc: When Kyle begs Stan to 'friend' him, Stan gets sucked into the world of Facebook. Kyle gets a hard lesson about the politics of Facebook when he friends the least popular kid in school.

programme.title: South Park: Summer Sucks
programme.desc: The entire town is gearing up for the annual Fourth of July celebration when a state-wide ban on fireworks is imposed. Jimbo and Ned cross the border into Mexico to get some Grade-A illegal fireworks.

programme.title: South Park: Jakovasaurs
programme.desc: The boys discover a prehistoric creature called a Jackovasaur while camping at Stark's Pond.

programme.title: South Park: The Death of Eric Cartman
programme.desc: Cartman is sure he's dead and Butters is sure that Eric Cartman's ghost is haunting him. Together they attempt to make amends to all the people Cartman has wronged over the years.

programme.title: South Park: Chickenpox
programme.desc: The kids' parents only have their best interests at heart when they arrange for Stan, Kyle and Cartman to be exposed to the chickenpox virus. When the boys find out, they execute a plan to give their parents a virus as well: herpes.

programme.title: South Park: Smug Alert!
programme.desc: Kyle and his family are moving to San Francisco. The only way Stan can get his best friend back is to convince everyone to start driving hybrid cars.

programme.title: South Park: Britney's New Look
programme.desc: When the boys help Britney Spears get to the North Pole, they discover the shocking secret behind her popularity.

programme.title: South Park: Conjoined Fetus Lady
programme.desc: Kyle visits the dreaded school nurse, who suffers from Conjoined Twin Myslexia Disease. His reaction prompts the entire town to rally behind the nurse, singling her out to 'honour' her. Meanwhile, Pip leads the school dodgeball team to the championships.

programme.title: South Park: Toilet Paper
programme.desc: Cartman convinces the boys to toilet paper their teacher's house. But when Kyle is overwhelmed with guilt for the horrendous prank, Cartman tries to kill him.

programme.desc: Terrance and Phillip must travel to Iran to save Terrance's little daughter, Sally. While they are gone Saddam Hussein takes over Canada, leaving Terrance and Phillip to save the entire country.

programme.title: South Park: Chickenlover
programme.desc: During a crime spree, Barbrady is forced to admit he can't read and must return to school. Anarchy ensues when the town realizes they are without law enforcement, so Barbrady makes the boys deputies to help keep the peace.

programme.title: South Park: Ike's Wee Wee
programme.desc: Mr. Mackey, the school counsellor, is fired and turns to drugs and alcohol. Meanwhile, when the boys find out what it means to be circumcised they try to save Ike from his Bris.

programme.title: South Park: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls
programme.desc: South Park's first film festival attracts crowds of pretentious, tofu-eating movie lovers to the quiet mountain town. The influx of raw vegetable waste taxes the sewage system putting Mr. Hankey's life in jeopardy.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Aid
programme.desc: A record company steals Chef's song 'Stinky Britches' and he sues them for the rights. When Johnny Cochrane defends the record company, Chef is left penniless. But he has some very famous and talented friends who want to help their old mentor.

programme.title: South Park: Gnomes
programme.desc: Cartman, Stan, Kyle and Kenny are assigned to write a report with Tweek, the very nervous and highly caffeinated boy who insists gnomes are stealing his underpants.

programme.title: South Park: The Succubus
programme.desc: Chef's parents arrive in South Park from Scotland fresh from an encounter with the Loch Ness Monster to attend Chef's wedding. However, the boys believe Chef's bride-to-be is a succubus, and they try to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: Tweek vs. Craig
programme.desc: The boys instigate a fight between Tweek and Craig in shop class. Meanwhile, Mr. Adler, the shop teacher, is haunted by a recurring dream of his lost love.

programme.title: South Park: Sexual Harassment Panda
programme.desc: After Sexual Harassment Panda 'educates' the children, Cartman sues Stan for sexual harassment, and a flurry of other lawsuits follow.

programme.title: South Park: Cat Orgy
programme.desc: While all the adults are gathering at Mr. Mackey's house to watch a meteor shower Shelly Marsh is left baby-sit Cartman. They square off when she invites her much older boyfriend over.

programme.title: South Park: Two Guys Naked in a Hot Tub
programme.desc: Stan's parents drag him along to Mr. Mackey's meteor shower party, where he is sent down into the basement to play with a 'bunch of Melvins.' The ATF believes everyone in the house to be part of a cult, and Stan and the 'Angels' must save the day.

programme.title: South Park: Jewbilee
programme.desc: Kyle invites Kenny to join him and Ike at Jewbilee, a camp for Jewish kids, where they make various arts and crafts as tribute to the great and powerful Moses.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan: Chinpoko Mon. Little do they know, they are being brainwashed by the Japanese to once again bomb Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Silly Hate Crime 2000
programme.desc: Cartman is pursued by the FBI for committing a hate crime against Token and lands in juvenile hall.

programme.title: South Park: Timmy! 2000
programme.desc: When Timmy is diagnosed with Attention Deficit Disorder, it triggers a wave of prescription drug abuse at South Park Elementary. With all the spare time he has now, Timmy joins a rock band as the lead singer.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Joins NAMBLA
programme.desc: Cartman suddenly finds Stan, Kenny and Kyle too immature to be his friends. He then decides to seek friendship using the Internet, where he finds an older man who is more than willing to be his 'friend.'

programme.title: South Park: Chef Goes Nanners
programme.desc: Chef's passionate protest declaring the South Park flag is racist enflames the entire town, including the kids.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Ridgely/ Corrao
programme.desc: It is grit versus glamour when a rodeo barrel racer nicknamed 'Cowgirl Jen' trades families with a luxury-living hair stylist named Kim. Fists fly in the most explosive table meeting ever, and the couples' reunion ignites an angry shouting match.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Baur/ Fine
programme.desc: A self-proclaimed 'saucy wench' who runs her chaotic household like a motley crew of pirates swaps places with a polished professional organizer who believes that bins and labels are the solution to all the world's problems

programme.title: Wife Swap: Alcorn/ Booker
programme.desc: California's Jenifer Alcorn, a former undefeated champion boxer who runs her home like an Olympic coach, swaps with New Yorker Regina, a mother who champions laying around the house, laying down hip hop tracks and competitive eating.

programme.title: Movie: Forgetting Sarah Marshall

programme.desc: A high school student running from her troubled past becomes the target of affection from an unwanted admirer.

programme.title: Movie: The Girl He Met Online
programme.desc: A woman with uncontrollable bipolar behaviour may be a risk for the man she's been seeing.

programme.title: Movie: Girl in the Box
programme.desc: In 1977, a 22-year-old is picked up hitchhiking by a couple who abduct her. She is kept in a coffin-sized box hidden beneath the couple's bed. When out of the box, she is a live-in slave, babysitter and victim of the man's extreme fantasies.

programme.title: Movie: Cleveland Abduction
programme.desc: The film explores the true story of Michelle Knight, a 21-year-old single mom who was abducted by Ariel Castro in Cleveland and held captive in his home for more than 11 years along with two teen girls.

programme.title: Movie: I Am Elizabeth Smart
programme.desc: The story of Elizabeth Ann Smart, who as abducted from her home in 2002 and held captive for nine-months before being rescued.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Blood and Terror
programme.desc: When a gay rights activist is stabbed to death in his own apartment, police are tasked with tracking down his killer, and in the process, they uncover a dark world of paranoia and delusions lurking in the heart of London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead 20 miles from her home after police believed she ran away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune
programme.desc: A woman's disappearance is tracked by a casino's security cameras. Investigators collect enough evidence left behind from the victim to inform them of who was responsible and how she disappeared.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead 20 miles from her home after police believed she ran away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Duelling Confessions
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead on the side of the road her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man. It would take forty years, an author and an expert in pedestrian accidents to find the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl is killed by her mother and father in her own home. The parents say they acted in self-defence but the forensic evidence indicates otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: D.C. Snipers
programme.desc: In 2002, a sniper terrorizes Washington D.C. and the surrounding suburbs, randomly targeting ordinary citizens. Ten are killed, three wounded.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Unabomber
programme.desc: Writing style reveals Unabomber's identity when Ted Kaczynski's sister-in-law recognizes his phrasing in his manifesto.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: The Siege at Waco
programme.desc: The siege at the Branch Davidian compound in Waco, Texas leads to 80 deaths, and the debacle captures America's attention and changes the ATF and the FBI.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Reagan Assassination Attempt
programme.desc: In 1981, a gunman fires six shots at Ronald Reagan. What follows is a chaotic rush to save Reagan's life, confusion at the White House, and an urgent investigation to find out if this is a wider plot, or the work of a lone assassin.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Andrea Yates
programme.desc: In 2001, Andrea Yates drowned her five small children in the bathtub of their Houston home. Her bizarre explanation was that she did it to save her children from Satan.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Thunderstruck
programme.desc: Richard Rawlings and the Gas Monkeys battle numerous setbacks including an act of God as they race to finish their old-time NASCAR tribute build. Then an old friend talks Richard into working on a dubious 'classic', an '85 Zimmer.

programme.title: BattleBots: Live to Die Another: Day Part 1
programme.desc: An all-new series bursting with robot combat goodness.

programme.title: BattleBots: Live to Die Another Day: Part 2
programme.desc: An all-new series bursting with robot combat goodness.

programme.title: BattleBots: My Super Sweet 16
programme.desc: The 2019 BattleBots World Championship kicks off an epic Sweet 16 competition, as the deadliest bots across the globe battle it out for the ultimate prize.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Declaration of Independence
programme.desc: Rick and his crew of greenhorns arrive in Yukon to start the new season. Parker and Tony face off over royalties in a massive confrontation that threatens to end one of their seasons before it begins.

programme.title: BattleBots: My Super Sweet 16
programme.desc: The 2019 BattleBots World Championship kicks off an epic Sweet 16 competition, as the deadliest bots across the globe battle it out for the ultimate prize.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Wagers and Wars
programme.desc: Todd and Parker go head to head in a $100 000 bet over who will get the most gold this season. Tony sets sail up the Yukon River to revive his second monster dredge and Parker makes a deal on new ground that leads to a dramatic showdown with Tony.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fury and Fire
programme.desc: Threatened by an approaching wildfire, Stuart and Toni Rinker need a quick solution to their failing Idaho homestead. The Raneys plan to fire-proof the Rinkers' cabin and build a firebreak.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: High Country Bear Lair
programme.desc: The Raneys build an old style root cellar and an innovative greenhouse and attempt to inspire two off-grid reluctant teenage sisters to help bring their father's dream to life.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Honey I Torched the Homestead
programme.desc: Fire is a constant threat for this Oregon homestead. Livestock should be meat, but here they are family pets. The Raneys must teach a hungry family to working together before it’s too late.

programme.title: Major League Fishing: 2019 World Championship: Sudden Death Round
programme.desc: Six anglers have survived the Elimination rounds and will face off in the Sudden Death round. The first four anglers to reach the target weight will advance to the Championship round.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Forsaken
programme.desc: When sparks don't fly deep in the Panamanian jungle, an ex-cop and a self-described wild child clash over cuddling. But when the challenge overwhelms one of them, the other must forage, trap and even kill to keep a glimmer of hope alive.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Thieves in the Night
programme.desc: One survivalist falls into a roaring fire after weeks of depleted energy due to no food. With just days to go, the pair makes a daring plan to survive.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Swarm
programme.desc: An ex-military and a mountain mom take on the jungles of Panama. Disguised as paradise, the harsh environment is teeming with killer bees and other aggressive and disease-carrying insects, one of which may prove to become the team's biggest threat.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Island of Tears
programme.desc: Max and Bianca face off with aggressive caiman, boa constrictors, large spiders, and thorny mangroves in this Superfan challenge on a tropical island in Panama.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Arachnid Overload
programme.desc: A survival-savvy yoga teacher and a custom knife maker tackle the brutal jungle of Colombia. Their primitive survival skills are impressive, but the deadly spiders and tics test both their courage and resilience, threatening to take them down.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Fan Down
programme.desc: A freak injury puts super-fan survivalists Maci and Justin at risk as they attempt to survive the treacherous Nicaraguan jungle for 14 days.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Unhinged
programme.desc: An ex-marine and a perky Southern girl attempt to survive three weeks in the Panamanian Jungle. Constant downpours, cabin fever, threats from predators, lack of sleep and extreme hunger soon take its toll on one of them.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Pick Your Poison
programme.desc: Swarming wasps, deadly anacondas, poisonous toads and venomous stingrays surround the survivalists in sun-scorched Brazil.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Grands Know Best

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Size Me Up

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Surprising Turn of Events

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'll Know It When I See It

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Cinderella Gone Wrong

programme.title: Undercover Boss: Popeye's Louisiana Kitchen
programme.desc: An employee's lack of southern hospitality frustrates the chief talent officer of Popyes Louisiana Kitchen, while another employee's generosity brings her to tears.

programme.title: Undercover Boss: Gigi's Cupcakes
programme.desc: The founder and CEO of Gigi's Cupcakes hopes to discover that her company has the proper ingredients to keep rising to the top. While undercover, she crumbles under the pressure of decorating a cake and spirals out of control when an employee does wrong.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob, You're Fired!
programme.desc: In order to save money, Mr. Krabs fires SpongeBob; however, unable to just "do nothing", SpongeBob decides to go back to work, no matter what - or where.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob's Big Birthday Blowout
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick tour the surface world, while the rest of Bikini Bottom prepares a surprise for SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Bucket/ Mind the Gap
programme.desc: Plankton creates a clone of himself and Mr. Krabs, but neither restaurant is safe from the newcomer. Then, Squidward closes the gap in SpongeBob's teeth, which causes a dramatic and unexpected change in his demeanor.

programme.title: Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader?: Sixth Grade Teacher
programme.desc: A schoolteacher is convinced she can ace elementary school, but when a question stumps her early on, she'll consider cheating much earlier than she expected.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Happy/ Old Man Patrick
programme.desc: SpongeBob can't drive, but you don't need a license to operate a self-driving car. Patrick thinks he is an old man, so SpongeBob reminds him how much fun it is to be a kid.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Doodle Dimension/ Moving Bubble Bass
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become trapped in an alternate dimension where anything they draw comes to life. SpongeBob and Patrick help Bubble Bass move out of his mother's basement.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patnocchio/ ChefBob
programme.desc: Plankton tells Patrick he's his conscience so he can convince him to steal him a Krabby Patty. SpongeBob gets stage fright and has to invent a new persona.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Appointment TV/ Karen's Virus
programme.desc: The long-lost episode of Mermaid Man is finally showing on TV, but SpongeBob may not make it home in time to watch. Karen gets a computer virus, and it's up to SpongeBob to get it out of her.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Ross Got High
programme.desc: When Monica invites the gang and her parents for Thanksgiving dinner, Chandler freaks.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Prom Video
programme.desc: Ross is determined to make Rachel see they should be together. An old video from Monica’s prom surfaces and Rachel sees how much Ross has always loved her. Joey buys Chandler a gold bracelet as a thank you gift.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where No One's Ready
programme.desc: Ross is concerned that the gang is going to make him late for an important dinner.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Embryos
programme.desc: Phoebe tries to beat the odds to get pregnant so she can become a surrogate mother.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Everybody Finds Out
programme.desc: Phoebe catches Monica and Chandler in a hot embrace and decides to toy with their secret.

programme.title: Mom: Poodle Fuzz and a Twinge of Jealousy
programme.desc: When an injury temporarily lands Bonnie in a wheelchair, Christy is forced to take over as building manager and makes a surprising discovery.

programme.title: Mom: Smooth Jazz and a Weird Floaty Eye
programme.desc: Bonnie insists on meeting Adam's estranged brother and things get weird when he takes a romantic interest in Christy.

programme.title: Mom: Too Many Hippies and Huevos Rancheros
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie rally around Marjorie when her husband has a stroke.

programme.title: Mom: Teenage Vampires and a White Russian
programme.desc: Bonnie is upset when her brother, Ray is arrested and calls Adam instead of her to bail him out. Also, Christy gets fired from her job at the restaurant.

programme.title: Mom: A Bear and a Bladder Infection
programme.desc: When Christy's long-distance relationship begins to fizzle, she seeks the company of a former fling. Also, Bonnie tries to give up coffee.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Lost Vegas
programme.desc: Doug's plans to earn brownie points by taking Carrie to a spa lands him in hot water.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Dugan Groupie
programme.desc: Doug gets jealous when Carrie enjoys her work so much that she even works on Saturdays.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Furious Gorge
programme.desc: When Carrie insists that Doug join an overeaters support group, he secretly opts out.

programme.title: Full House: Joey and Stacey and Oh Yeah Jesse
programme.desc: Joey's girlfriend thinks that Jesse is too bossy towards Joey; Comet chews up the house.

programme.title: Full House: No More Mr. Dumb Guy
programme.desc: Jesse enlists the help of Joey in order to appear more intellectual at a cultural event.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chum Bucket Supreme/ Single Cell Anniversary
programme.desc: Plankton hires Patrick to create advertising slogans for the Chum Bucket. SpongeBob helps Plankton find the perfect anniversary gift for Karen.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Accidents Will Happen/ The Other Patty
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs is manipulated into caring for Squidward when he gets injured on the job. Mr. Krabs and Plankton both have troubles at the new 'Flabby Patty' restaurant.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Baby Octopus
programme.desc: A baby Octopus gets separated from its mother and sinks the Flounder. Sea Patrol needs to save the day.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Sea Patrol: Pups Save the Pirated Sea Patroller
programme.desc: The ferris wheel has been stolen by Sid the Pirate and Arrby, so the pups set out to bring it back to Adventure Bay. However, Sid comes up with an even more sneaky plan: to steal the Sea Patroller.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Thrills and Drills
programme.desc: Ravi must face one of his worst fears when it interferes with his Ranger duties.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mind the Gap/ Breakin'
programme.desc: Squidward closes the gap in SpongeBob's teeth, which causes a change in his demeanor. SpongeBob takes his first break ever at work, but isn't sure how to spend his time.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Great Snail Race/ The Sewers of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: Squidward gets a pure-bread snail, Snelle, and decides to race her in the snail races. SpongeBob becomes competitive and enters Gary, coaching him to the point of exhaustion.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Monster Who Came to Bikini Bottom/ Welcome to the Bikini Bottom Triangle
programme.desc: A monster terrorizes Bikini Bottom until Patrick befriends the huge creature.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Atlantis SquarePants
programme.desc: When SpongeBob finds a missing artifact from the lost city of Atlantis, he and his friends are invited to visit the magical city. Unfortunately, once there, Patrick accidentally bursts the world's oldest living bubble.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob in RandomLand/ SpongeBob's Bad Habit
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Squidward take a delivery to a dreaded town where the laws of logic no longer apply. SpongeBob can't stop biting his nails, but he can't figure out why.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: Stampede!
programme.desc: While stranded in the jungle during a massive storm, Claire and Simon unknowingly stumble upon a clue to the whereabouts of the treasure sought by Sinjin.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: S12 Eps #250 Broken Alarm/Karen's Baby
programme.desc: SpongeBob breaks his alarm clock and nothing else is loud enough to wake him up. And, Karen learns that kids grow up too fast after her new child arrives in the mail.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Unreal Estate/ Code Yellow
programme.desc: When SpongeBob thinks he's allergic to his pineapple, Squidward offers to help find him a new home. Squidward is getting a nose job at the local hospital, and SpongeBob tags along as moral support.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Nutmare/ Bulletin Board
programme.desc: Sandy creates the latest acorn-based food sensation, but her tree pays the price for her greed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pull Up a Barrel/ Company Picnic
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs regales SpongeBob with tales from his old Navy days. Later, Mr. Krabs throws a company picnic to boost morale, but Plankton is hosting his own on the same day!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob's Place/ Plankton Gets the Boot
programme.desc: When SpongeBob cooks at home, Mr. Krabs' customers leave his restaurant and head for SpongeBob's Place.When Plankton gets kicked out of the house, it's up to SpongeBob to teach him how to win his computer wife back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book/ Bumper to Bumper
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krabby Patty That Ate Bikini Bottom / Bubble Buddy Returns
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs uses Sandy's experimental growth formula on a Krabby Patty and the results are disastrous.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob in RandomLand/ SpongeBob's Bad Habit
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Squidward take a delivery to a dreaded town where the laws of logic no longer apply. SpongeBob can't stop biting his nails, but he can't figure out why.

programme.title: The Loud House: No Such Luck/ Frog Wild
programme.desc: The sisters think Lincoln is bad luck so they ban him from attending their activities. When Lincoln finds out his class is dissecting frogs, he and Lana embark on a mission to rescue them.

programme.title: The Loud House: Funny Business/ Snow Bored
programme.desc: Lincoln becomes Luan's clown assistant, but starts hogging the spotlight. The Loud kids set out to show Lisa what is 'fun' about a snow day.

programme.title: Weather Underground
programme.desc: A breakdown of the science behind today's weather with fan interaction and frequent visits from guest meteorologists.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Plan of Attack
programme.desc: The Ross crew deals with a wreck filled with loose car engines; a truck's cab shears off, shutting down the road to the border; John Allen goes down a steep ravine for a recovery.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Ladies and Gents, We Are Going to War
programme.desc: A blizzard gives Herb's crew of night of non-stop recoveries; a heavy rescue veteran fights the toughest battle of his career in a multi-semi pileup.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Whole Lot of Faith
programme.desc: Toronto is gridlocked by a massive wreck scene; Sonny becomes a mentor when a high-pressure job goes wrong; Onne and crew work to save a trailer that's going to tear apart.

programme.title: World's Wildest Weather: Fire Storm
programme.desc: We hear about the most costly natural disaster in the history of Canada: the Fort McMurray Forest Fires of 2016 through the accounts of a man who watched his house burn down on CCTV and a firefighter who could not save his own home from the blaze.

programme.title: World's Wildest Weather: Golden State Nightmare
programme.desc: We hear about the horrifying impact of the Thomas Fires in Southern California in 2017.

programme.title: World's Wildest Weather: Monster Typhoon
programme.desc: Discover a family business which was destroyed by the flooding in the UK in 2015.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Pick Up Sticks
programme.desc: Jamie calls in his brother Jason's rotator to tackle a recovery in the Canyon; the Mission Towing team juggles a lost load of telephone poles; emergency responders race to a crash on the Coq involving one of Jamie's crew.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Family Matters
programme.desc: The Quiring family work together to lift a semi loaded with industrial paper rolls back onto its wheels; an original member of Jamie's towing family starts to feel the physical and mental toll of heavy rescue.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: All Nighter
programme.desc: A spectacular crash between two tractor-trailers has Jordie's crew working through the night; Scott is forced to get inventive to finish a job for Jamie Davis Heavy Rescue; Al and Gord try to get a handle on a 30-tonne cement drum.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Heavy Duty
programme.desc: Jamie's rookie driver, Mike, is dispatched to rescue a convoy of oversized loads on The Coq; Scott battles to keep a spun out lumber truck from tipping; Mission Towing tries to fish a 40-thousand pound relic out of a river.

programme.title: AMHQ Weekend
programme.desc: The science and stories of weather, plus in-depth forecasts with a focus on weekend weather.

programme.title: Weekend Recharge
programme.desc: The latest news and weather to prepare for the weekend.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Wild Weather Control
programme.desc: Winter that's one for the record books, a bus that tries to outrun rare Romanian tornado and a shelf cloud that is the stuff of nightmares when wild weather is unleashed.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Texas Flash Flood
programme.desc: A flash flood in the Texas Hill Country kills 13 people and destroys 350 homes. A father watches helplessly as his house is pulled down the river, and his wife and two children are tossed into the current.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Snowmobile Desperation
programme.desc: Scott and Vivian Mayo travel to their remote camp outside Cantwell, Alaska. Two days into their trip, Scott heads out alone on his snowmobile to carve trails when he becomes disoriented in heavy fog.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Weird Waters
programme.desc: Giant blooms of glowing creatures, a lake changed into a huge bowl of cement, 60-foot snow drifts turns a journey into a destination, the wind sinks a city and Spider Lightning on this episode of Strangest Weather on Earth.

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Condo From Hell
programme.desc: Scott buys a tiny condo unit in a low-income neighborhood, but soon finds out the payoff isn't going to come easy.

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Reptile House
programme.desc: Scott buys a dilapidated house that is unexpectedly occupied by some creepy cold-blooded creatures.

programme.title: Tiny House Nation: Tiny Digs for Racing Pigs
programme.desc: John and Zack head to Arkansas farm country, to help a couple who have been living on the road turn a school bus into a tiny home where they can settle down.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: The Bargain Bin
programme.desc: Ravaged by a hurricane and overtaken by nature, this low-cost home in need of low-cost renovation might be the perfect zombie for the team to do a quick, easy flip.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: Historically Challenged
programme.desc: Shortly after Keith sells the team on this giant zombie house, they find out that sits in one of Orlando's historic districts, which is definitely a selling point, but also forces the team to follow certain guidelines.

programme.title: Live PD: Rewind
programme.desc: A look back at some of the best moments from 'Live PD.'

programme.title: Live PD: Rewind

programme.title: Live PD
programme.desc: Unfettered and unfiltered live access inside the country's busiest police forces and the communities they patrol. Host Dan Abrams and police detectives give insight to what audiences are seeing in real time.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vegan Plant
programme.desc: Michael feeds a cannibalistic plant at a garden center, and at the tuxedo store, he sells a tie that literally suits itself. Plus, at a hockey rink, Michael's assistant is speechless with a trick so electric it melts the ice.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sorcery or Science
programme.desc: Michael sweetens a woman's day at a candy store when a chocolate bunny eats her ring, and at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, he inflates pretzels at a snack stand. Plus, one of Michael's tricks gets flushed down the tubes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr feel the wrath of disapproving focus groups after nonsensical presentations, and try to reach out and touch strangers at the mall with anything but their hands. Plus, the guys must quit their job in front of a crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Find out which joker once included inline skating as a skill on his resume, who was a mathlete and a bowler in high school and which joker was afraid of the dark as a child.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Weight Loss
programme.desc: Adam illustrates all the reasons low-fat diets can actually make you fatter, and why counting calories is a waste of time.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nutrition
programme.desc: Adam shows why vitamin supplements don't make us any healthier, and that the 'balanced breakfast' we've been sold is anything but. Later, he reveals how most of the nutritional science the media reports on isn't science at all.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Funeral
programme.desc: The Nine-Nine gets another personnel change that could put Jake and Amy's relationship at risk. Meanwhile, Terry assists Holt with an important public relations matter. Rosa and Gina try to convince Charles to rethink his affection for a fellow officer.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Boyle's Hunch
programme.desc: Jake thinks Boyle might have met his soulmate in Genevieve, an art gallery owner, and he tries to help set them up. Meanwhile, Rosa deals with inter-precinct theft and Holt seeks Amy's help with an image campaign.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Oolong Slayer
programme.desc: When investigating a serial killer, Jake enlists Holt's help in an attempt to solve the case off the radar. At the precinct, Rosa and Amy are forced to deal with demands from an old adversary, and Terry discovers a new obsession.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Halloween III
programme.desc: The third installment of Captain Holt and Jake's Halloween heist culminates with a tie-breaking competition to claim the title of 'amazing detective slash genius.' This year, Jake and Holt split the squad into two teams to help them win.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Into the Woods
programme.desc: Jake and Charles convince Terry to take a weekend camping trip as a needed 'babymoon,' but they soon realize it might not be the idealistic weekend they had hoped. Amy enlists Gina’s help to prepare her for an important presentation.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Mattress
programme.desc: Jake and Amy convince the Captain to let them work a case together involving a new street drug, but their new relationship gets in the way. Meanwhile, at the precinct, Charles panics when he realizes he's damaged one of Holt's prized possessions.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Full Moon Fever
programme.desc: FD braces for a night of insane full moon rescue calls. Plus, Eddie and Grannie go on active appendage duty and Ike gets bitten into an altered state.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Old Flame
programme.desc: All New Eddie runs into his cradle-robbing first love and must decide whether to rekindle his romance with the sexy senior citizen. Then, Granny and Lucy compete to win the affections of an androgynous dispatcher and Terry discovers moisturizer.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Soul Mom
programme.desc: Joyelle is done with dating actors, Daniel Weingarten accepts a challenge from his parents, and Yamaneika explains just how hard it is to run these streets. Plus, Rachel Feinstein's mom has soul in the 'joke of the night.'

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Worst Laid Plans
programme.desc: Rachel Feinstein, Tony Baker and Nate Jackson perform.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: The Inappropriate Barber
programme.desc: Mike Troy, Cee Jay Craxx and Paul Elia perform.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Juicy
programme.desc: Ron G, Steven Briggs, Correy Bell and Neko White perform.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: The Laffs Are Back
programme.desc: Clayton English recalls his nightmare day job and Kira Soltanovich has a screaming match with her toddler son. Plus, Kerry Coddett gets catcalled by a toothless panhandler and Daniel Tirado daydreams about ditching his phone.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Fingering the Man
programme.desc: Molly Austin takes a bachelorette party to the next level, and Jonathan Martin's parents give new meaning to the word 'cheap'. Plus, if you thought your family was embarrassing, Rachel Feinstein's might have them beat.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Smartest Inventions 3
programme.desc: Inventions include a blanket that absorbs flatulence, a wig made especially for cats, and a treadmill on wheels that finally makes it possible to take your indoor jogging routine outside.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Smartest Inventions 4
programme.desc: Inventions include a bra that doubles as a gas mask, a bib used for eating while driving and slippers with headlights.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Smartest Inventions 5
programme.desc: Questionably brilliant innovations in portable toilets, beer-finding technology, weapon storage and wigs for newborns.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Smartest Inventions 6
programme.desc: Stars offer hilarious commentaries while viewing footage of the world's dumbest people.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Japanese Waterless Folding Toilet
programme.desc: Find out which celebrity Michael named one of his wigs after and which trick required Michael's hidden hip-hop talents.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: An Elevated Ferret Alert
programme.desc: Find out which trick made it hard for Michael to walk the next day, what trick was added at the last minute after a prop broke and what animal Michael fosters during shoots.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Faux Pas to Wear
programme.desc: Why Michael says "shenanigans" during some tricks, his favorite trick of all time and why the crew had to shut down production for an hour.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: The Framing Canon
programme.desc: Find out which magic team member knows how to ride a unicycle, what trick almost used an alpaca and which trick nearly resulted in Michael slicing open his neck.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Drugs
programme.desc: Adam weeds through the myths of marijuana, exposes the blunt truth about the War on Drugs, and explains how prescription pills are the true gateway drug.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Prison
programme.desc: Adam and Eve shed light on jail rehabilitation, solitary confinement and the fact that corporations make money off of prison inmates.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Wild West
programme.desc: Adam illustrates how, despite its macho man reputation, prostitutes actually helped settle the West. He then goes on to explain why the 'All-American Cowboy' is a myth, and that the real hero of the west wasn't a person at all - it was air conditioning.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Justice
programme.desc: After getting Emily out of prison, Adam and his sister Rhea take on the justice system, shining a spotlight on the infamous McDonalds hot coffee lawsuit, and the substantial problems with the jury duty system.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Having a Baby
programme.desc: Adam dispels the myth about getting pregnant after 35, delves into breastfeeding vs. formula, and explores postpartum depression for women, and men.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Art
programme.desc: Adam poses the question of what makes great art and shows why pieces visible to the masses are revered, regardless of artistic merit. He exposes the masters as copycats, and reveals that today's art market is a moneymaking scheme.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: You're Cut Off
programme.desc: The guys pose as employees at a copy centre, conduct bizarre exit interviews for moviegoers and then lead some very peculiar protests. Later, it's unhappy hour for tonight's big loser, as he cuts off paying customers at a party.
