programme.title: Southern at Heart: Grandma's Cookbook
programme.desc: Damaris Phillips inherited her grandmother's recipe book and is inspired to update a few of the most memorable recipes to include in her first cookbook. She enlists her trusted friend and chef Becca to help, and gets to work re-imagining classic dishes.

programme.title: Farmhouse Rules: Breakfast For Dinner
programme.desc: Nancy prepares gooey cinnamon buns with cream cheese icing, sausage pancakes, and sweet potato hash with fried eggs.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Retro Reboot
programme.desc: Guy Fieri brings some of his most creative chef friends to the ranch to revamp dishes that are best described as moldy oldies. Aarti Sequeira uses cardamom to give chicken a la king an Indian makeover. Justin Warner deconstructs and reinvents crab Louie.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: I'm Outta Here
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli prepares make-ahead meals for her husband, Tom, to enjoy while she's in Arizona. On the menu are farro, roasted beet and goat cheese salad, beef bourguignon, a French beef sandwich and blueberry cake with lemon mascarpone cream.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Alex's 16th Birthday
programme.desc: There's a big secret on the ranch -- a surprise 16th birthday party for Alex with family, friends and all her favourite food.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Truly Madly Crazy
programme.desc: Ree cooks up some crazy, fun ideas for game night food. There's a whole new take on a football favorite with pull-apart Pizza Rolls, then over-the-top Hawaiian burgers piled high with grilled pineapple.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Pizza Ree-Boot
programme.desc: Ree Drummond starts a pizza revolution with mini cauliflower pizzas for lunch with her daughter, a meal kit for herbed chicken Caesar salad pizza, Marsala mushroom and goat cheese flatbreads and a watermelon pizza.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Boxing Boys
programme.desc: Ree bakes fruity granola chocolate chip cookies and prepares a dinner of Italian sloppy Joes with delicious garlic toast.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Jewish New Year
programme.desc: Molly Yeh's family is in town to celebrate Rosh Hashana, the Jewish new year, and she makes a fabulous brunch to mark the occasion. They'll love her sweet apple butter rolls with honey marzipan frosting.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: New Farm Traditions
programme.desc: Molly is putting a fresh spin on the classic farm lunch. There's her easy garlic and onion challah bread, chopped salad with crumbled feta and her all-time favourite creamy homemade hummus.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Perfect Plate of Fall
programme.desc: Autumn flavours are in the spotlight as 'The Kitchen' serves a plate of fall favourites. Geoffrey shares his apple cider salmon and Katie Lee makes a brown butter safe butternut squash bake. Plus, learn easy fall appetizers with Sunny.

programme.title: Good Eats: Rich Little Poor Boy
programme.desc: One of America's most storied sandwiches gets a historic rethink and a technical do-over, from the oysters to the bread and everything in between. Alton Brown also makes an argument for shucking.

programme.title: Good Eats: Raw Ambition
programme.desc: Alton journeys through the history and science of the greatest of all raw meat dishes: steak tartare.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Spice Games
programme.desc: Four chefs who like their food with some heat fight for the title of spice master by making a spicy high-end dinner with ingredients for bread pudding, playing Spree Ball to determine their dish's pepper and creating a spicy guilty pleasure.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Blogger Battle
programme.desc: Four of America's hottest food bloggers go head to head in a culinary battle worth up to $20,000. 'Between two buns,' tacos without taco ingredients, and a 'trending dinner' are the challenges.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Food Wheel Free-For-All
programme.desc: The chefs are taking a big spin around the market with three rounds of Food Wheel games! First, chefs spin the budget wheel to win a paltry $9.04 for their pork dish.

programme.title: Good Eats: Bean Stalker
programme.desc: Alton reinvents the classic green bean casserole just in time to save the holidays.

programme.title: Good Eats: Major Pepper
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes a closer look at the king of spices, pepper, goes in search of the perfect peppermill, and examines the peculiar (but delicious) properties of pepper's essential oils.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad '60s Meal
programme.desc: Iron chefs paired with bartenders create a '60s meal melee. Chef Alex Guarnaschelli and David Oertel face off against Chef Marc Forgione and Natasha David.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Morimoto Vs. Tila
programme.desc: Jet Tila, a Guinness world record holder, challenges Iron Chef Morimoto.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Symon Vs. Brock
programme.desc: Sean Brock enters Kitchen stadium for the first time to challenge Iron Chef Michael Symon.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Forgione vs. Waxman
programme.desc: Iron Chef Marc Forgione plays the role of sous chef to his father, Larry Forgione, as the two take on culinary legend and close family friend chef Jonathan Waxman.

programme.title: Fire Masters: That's the Way the Chicharron Crumbles
programme.desc: The Signature Round showcases some barbecue heavyweights with something to prove. The Crossfire Round ingredients and the Feast of Fire serve up some nostalgic summer classics.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Tournament of Champions: Flay vs. Stone
programme.desc: Aussie Chef Curtis Stone enters Kitchen Stadium to take on Iron Chef Bobby Flay in a fiery battle to the finish.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Romantic Spots
programme.desc: We tour the Big Apple, dipping into eateries that are perfect for you and that someone.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Bistro
programme.desc: Hip new restaurant updates French bistro classics in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Off the Grid
programme.desc: Go off the beaten path and visit eateries that are unknown to tourists. A rustic Italian restaurant in Staten Island, a perfect pizza in Las Vegas and a dining destination in Hawaii.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Small Bites
programme.desc: You can sample everything on the menu when it comes in the form of small bites.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Coffee Break
programme.desc: The most unique sweets to suit your morning cup o' Joe. Abraco may be small in size, but its morning pastries are packed with big bold flavors like black sesame cardamom spiced cake, and saffron sugar babk.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Breakfast Sweets
programme.desc: These food personalities share the best Breakfast sweets from around the country. Brunches from the Pacific Northwest to New York City.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sugar High
programme.desc: It's time for the ultimate sugar high. In Miami, Brain Freeze Nitrogen Ice Cream Lab is concocting delicious creations, and offering a mad scientist challenge to eat 30 scoops of ice cream in 30 minutes.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Old Is New Again
programme.desc: Classic desserts get deliciously updated at three sweet shops across the country. Skull and Cakebones rocks vegan cupcakes in Austin, Texas, with flavors like basil berry, dirty chai and just beet it.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jerusalem
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern investigates the rich culinary heritage of Jerusalem. From savory classics like shawarma, falafel, kubbeh and hummus to tempting pastries like halva and bureka, this holy city's edible icons are steeped in history.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Portugal
programme.desc: Andrew reveals Lisbon's iconic seafood, pork sandwiches, and custard tarts.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mauritius
programme.desc: From piping-hot fried dumplings and handmade egg noodles to veggie-stuffed flatbread and curried swordfish, Andrew Zimmern showcases the flavorful fusions of the island paradise of Mauritius.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Marseille
programme.desc: From beef stew to French pizza, Andrew Zimmern uncovers Marseille's edible icons.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Prince Of Cakes
programme.desc: Prince Charles gives his royal approval to Phil and Christine's cakes. While Eloise challenges herself with a cake of gigantic proportions, Molly shows Manchester United pride in her latest cake creation.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Cakes On The Move
programme.desc: Karisha attempts to add electronics to a challenging christening cake, and Rosie's cake lights up the night with a neon fireworks display.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Luxurious and Playful Cakes
programme.desc: Luxurious details and elegant decor make for a most-extravagant wedding cake. Then zoo animals come to life, sugar looks like hand-blown glass, and a duck rides a mechanical bull on a super playful birthday cake.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Fancy Flower and Farm Cakes
programme.desc: A baker designs an epic pop culture wedding cake with a massive dragon, and customers in a coffee shop are pleasantly surprised by a sweet creation with an edible mug.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Girl Scouts
programme.desc: See whose Girl Scout cookie crumbles as four talented cake artists compete to have their cake creation at the center of a massive celebration for the Girl Scouts of America, as well as the $10,000 prize.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Champs: Disney Princesses
programme.desc: It's an adventure for the ages with Cinderella, Ariel, Princess Jasmine and many more, as four champion bakers battle to have their amazing cake creation as the centrepiece of a party celebrating Disney's princesses.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Golden Ghost Town
programme.desc: The crew travels to a sinister ghost town near Wolf Creek, Oregon. During the investigation, Zak is overtaken by an aggressive entity, Aaron is incapacitated by a dark force, eerie figures appear and a voice warns of a demonic presence.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Melrose Hotel
programme.desc: Zak and the crew investigate a historic hotel plagued by dark spirits in Grand Junction, CO.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Eureka Mining Town
programme.desc: Zak and the crew travel to the small mining town of Eureka, Nevada, to investigate reports of an aggressive spirit at a hotel as well as a mysterious underground tunnel system built by oppressed Chinese laborers.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Mount Wilson Ranch
programme.desc: Zak and the crew land outside of Pioche, Nevada, to investigate a mysterious ranch known for its concentration of supernatural energy and countless reports of extraterrestrial activity.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Extra Pulses: Enchanted Forest and the Titanic Museum
programme.desc: In an enhanced episode, Zak and the crew investigate strange phenomena at an amusement park in Oregon. The guys then head to the Titanic Museum in Branson, Missouri, where employees believe the spirits of the shipwreck haunt the building.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Union Hotel
programme.desc: Zak and the crew travel to the Bay Area to investigate aggressive paranormal activity at a historic hotel that has endured the brutal California Gold Rush, a smallpox epidemic and a period as a seedy flophouse.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Extra Pulses: Enchanted Forest and the Titanic Museum
programme.desc: In an enhanced episode, Zak and the crew investigate strange phenomena at an amusement park in Oregon. The guys then head to the Titanic Museum in Branson, Missouri, where employees believe the spirits of the shipwreck haunt the building.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Slave to Love
programme.desc: From a former spy hub on the coast of Spain to a cave in Puerto Rico that just might hold the fabled Fountain of Youth, Josh explores six legendary locations where passionate people risked it all for love.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Moment of Truth
programme.desc: From a Florida prison where a convicted murderer went from hated to hero to the site of a fiery Viking massacre in Ireland, Josh explores six legendary locations where heroes and villains faced their moment of truth.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: About Time
programme.desc: From a cursed clock in Prague to a death-defying rescue in the snowy Sierra Nevada Mountains, Josh Gates explores six legendary locations that have withstood the test of time.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: What Lurks Within
programme.desc: From a lake in India with connections to alien life to a train station in Spain where a mild-mannered customs clerk took on the Nazis, Josh uncovers the mysteries of what lurks within six extraordinary locations around the globe.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: End of the World
programme.desc: From a secret underground government bunker to a town that miraculously survived a tsunami, Josh explores five locations where the end of the world was just the beginning.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Can You Dig It?
programme.desc: From a treacherous island prison in Ireland to a California mining town that saw more than its share of murder and mayhem, Josh digs deep to uncover the buried secrets of six legendary locations.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: From a tense standoff near the Berlin Wall at the height of the Cold War to an Arizona prison where an unlikely outlaw finagled her freedom, Josh Gates explores five legendary locations where fight or flight were the only options.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Out of This World
programme.desc: Josh shares five locations where the natural and supernatural worlds can be explored, including a haunted asylum in upstate New York and an underground cathedral built entirely of salt in Poland.

programme.title: These Woods are Haunted: Revolutionary Soldier and Creature in the Woods
programme.desc: Three sisters get more than they bargained for when they decide to take photos in a graveyard at night, and a young family's day hike turns into a nightmare when they are terrorized by an unknown creature in the woods.

programme.title: These Woods are Haunted: Bigfoot and Ghost Cave
programme.desc: A fishing trip changes a man's life forever when he and his grandfather find themselves under attack by an unknown creature. A couple encounters a violent entity after they come across a cave in the woods.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Fool's gold
programme.desc: Jihoon reveals a huge secret about his past to Deavan. Jenny and Sumit's relationship reaches a boiling point. Paul and Karine become parents. Tensions build when Laura's son arrives in Tunisia and meets Aladin.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: Jenny is devastated when she hears shocking news about Sumit. Laura is torn between Liam and Aladin. Corey is conflicted about returning to Evelin in Ecuador. Paul's mother arrives in Brazil. Tiffany is worried about giving birth in South Africa.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Bridesmaid Meltdown
programme.desc: A bridesmaid falls into a coma after drinking too much. A premature infant is abandoned at the hospital and must quickly be revived.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Heart Stings
programme.desc: A woman's thigh is impaled with a piece of rebar. A man brings his girlfriend into the ER for an STD work-up and she's the strangest patient the doctor has ever seen. To save a woman's life, an ER doctor must confront the prejudice of her colleagues.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Unabomber
programme.desc: Writing style reveals Unabomber's identity when Ted Kaczynski's sister-in-law recognizes his phrasing in his manifesto.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: The Siege at Waco
programme.desc: The siege at the Branch Davidian compound in Waco, Texas leads to 80 deaths, and the debacle captures America's attention and changes the ATF and the FBI.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Bombing of Oklahoma City: The Explosion (Part 1)
programme.desc: In 1995, Timothy McVeigh, a 26-year-old U.S. army veteran, detonated a truck bomb outside a federal building in Oklahoma City. We take a look back at the events that led up to the largest domestic terrorist attack in the history of the United States.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Bombing of Oklahoma City: McVeigh's Shocking Confession (Part 2)
programme.desc: In an exclusive prison interview, Timothy McVeigh himself describes how events in his personal life and the world around him inspired him to kill his fellow Americans. We also hear from survivors of the bombing and family members of the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A Colorado teen goes missing and the community bands together to find her. When her body is found nearly two years later, the investigation quickly switches from missing to murder.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Snitch Work

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Boy's Story
programme.desc: A money order salesman is brutally murdered and two teenage brothers and their best friend are arrested. They spend almost four decades behind bars, until a journalist takes notice of the case and uncovers evidence of the men’s innocence.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Double Jeopardy
programme.desc: The wife and two children of an Air Force captain are murdered in Fayetteville, North Carolina, and Army sergeant Tim Hennis is sentenced to death for the crime.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Blood and Water

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murder in Paris

programme.title: Undercover Boss: Celebrity Edition: Jewel

programme.title: Undercover Boss: Celebrity Edition: Gabby Douglas

programme.title: Undercover Boss: Mayor of Gary, Indiana
programme.desc: The mayor of Gary, Indiana, goes undercover as a municipal employee in her own city. During her shifts, she works with a sanitation employee, a firefighter, a police officer and a beach maintenance crew member.

programme.title: Undercover Boss: Nestle Toll House Cafe by Chips
programme.desc: A no-nonsense COO goes undercover to make sure the future of Nestle Toll House Café by Chip remains sweet but she experiences a sugar crash when she fails to meet her own customer service requirements.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Technicolor Weather
programme.desc: From Sapphire caves to bizarre blue lava and rainbow clouds, this episode exposes the invisible forces behind the strangest, most beautiful events the planet. Featuring forces that eat snow, create perfect clear cubes and cause walrus gatherings.

programme.title: Top Ten: Worst Hurricanes of the 2000s
programme.desc: Fuelled by warm ocean water, they are the most violent and destructive storms on earth. We count down the worst Hurricanes to hit the planet since the start of the new millennium.

programme.title: Top Ten: Weather 'What Ifs'
programme.desc: History is dotted with close calls and near misses that meant the difference between life and death. We countdown the top ten weather 'what ifs.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Snowmobile Desperation
programme.desc: Scott and Vivian Mayo travel to their remote camp outside Cantwell, Alaska. Two days into their trip, Scott heads out alone on his snowmobile to carve trails when he becomes disoriented in heavy fog.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Wild Weather Control
programme.desc: Winter that's one for the record books, a bus that tries to outrun rare Romanian tornado and a shelf cloud that is the stuff of nightmares when wild weather is unleashed.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Texas Flash Flood
programme.desc: A flash flood in the Texas Hill Country kills 13 people and destroys 350 homes. A father watches helplessly as his house is pulled down the river, and his wife and two children are tossed into the current.

programme.title: Top Ten Extreme Jobs
programme.desc: Extreme jobs are not for everyone, but if you're willing to battle raging weather and risk life and limb for your paycheck, you may be a perfect candidate. We are counting down the top ten most extreme jobs on the planet.

programme.title: Top Ten Weather Destinations
programme.desc: From extreme heat, to bone chilling cold, every year millions of us set out on a weather watching adventure. If you love weather like we do, these are the top ten must-see destinations for your travel bucket list.

programme.title: Top Ten Amazing Moments
programme.desc: For more than thirty years, our meteorologists have battled the wildest weather on the planet. They've taken you along for the ride and in the heart of the storm, their reports have kept you informed. We look at ten amazing moments in weather reporting.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Floods and Spiders
programme.desc: Test your knowledge of poisonous spiders, big wave wipeouts, icy hills and tumbleweeds on the attack! Find out if you'd know what to do if you were trapped in a flash flood or small plane crash.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Avalanches and Jellyfish
programme.desc: Looking at the possibilities of surviving a massive avalanche, as well as a terrible sting from a jellyfish. Also featuring footage on deathly heat in the desert, white-water rapids and much more.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Surviving Tornadoes
programme.desc: Video of tornadoes tearing through an airport, a gas station and a trailer park is shown. What do you do when a tornado towers beside your car and how to survive a brutal twister that rips through a city is featured.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Gators and Ice Tsunami
programme.desc: What would you do if a wall of ice threatened to crush your home? Could you cope being trapped in an elevator? Incredible video pits you against deadly black ice, intense sandstorms, and hungry alligators!

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Pest
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin help Anais deal with someone who’s bothering her at school.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Sale
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin do everything they can to stop Mr. Robinson selling his house.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Cringe
programme.desc: Gumball and Hotdog Kid discover why they're so awkward with each other.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Cage
programme.desc: The adventures of a blue cat named Gumball and his buddy Darwin, a goldfish with legs.

programme.title: Movie: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Three friends are trying to get home to New York City. Their travels end up in them joining a travelling circus in Europe to disguise them so they do not get caught or draw attention to themselves. They reinvent the circus in their own way.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Z Kai: Full-Power Frieza! Shenron, Grant Our Wish!
programme.desc: Kami and King Kai concoct a plan to restore the wish-granting power of the Namekian Dragon Balls, and Goku continues his epic battle with the villainous Frieza.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super: To the Noble, Proud End! Vegeta Falls!
programme.desc: Following Android 17’s sacrifice, the remaining Saiyans need time to recover. As Goku rests, Vegeta takes it upon himself to challenge Jiren one on one!

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Human Flesh
programme.desc: Bob rallies the team to cook up some business, but the day takes an unexpected turn when his youngest daughter starts a rumour during show and tell.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Crawl Space
programme.desc: When Bob learns that Linda's mother is coming for a visit, he wants nothing to do with it. Linda has been cracking the whip at home, and sends Bob to fix a leak in the roof she discovered.

programme.title: Family Guy: Brian Goes Back to College
programme.desc: After writing a story for a local magazine, Brian lands a job with the New Yorker. However, his college dropout status haunts him so he decides to go back to university to get his degree.

programme.title: Family Guy: The Courtship of Stewie's Father
programme.desc: When Stewie intensifies his efforts to kill Lois, she thinks he is acting out and orders Peter to spend more time with him. They begin to do some bonding until a theme park outing ends disastrously.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super: Transcendent Limit Break! Autonomous Ultra Instinct!
programme.desc: Once again, Goku ascends to new heights. As Ultra Instinct takes over, now it's a matter of whether surpassing his own limits is enough to surpass Jiren.

programme.title: gen:LOCK: Identity Crisis
programme.desc: The team must evolve further if they hope to make a stand against the Union's deadliest weapon.

programme.title: Dr. Stone: Stone World: The Beginning
programme.desc: Taiju and his friends rebuild their broken world with the power of science.

programme.title: Fire Force: The Spreading Malice
programme.desc: Tamaki watches on as Shinra confronts Rekka over his actions and reminisces about how she once looked up to the lieutenant. Rekka reveals his objective in seeking out compatible children, one which could spell disaster for the entire world.

programme.title: Food Wars! Shokugeki no Soma: The Memory of a Single Dish
programme.desc: It's Megumi's chance to show off her skills. As Soma takes a supporting role, this time it's her cooking that will have to save the day.

programme.title: Black Clover: Storming the Eye of the Midnight Sun's Hideout
programme.desc: The Royal Knights take some time to rest before preparing for their attack against the Eye of the Midnight Sun. But when an enemy spy is discovered, the mission is moved up. This will be the biggest test of Asta's strength.

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Wasabi and Namida
programme.desc: Sumire, Wasabi and Namida are given a mission to recover animals that someone has released from their cages at the zoo.

programme.title: Naruto: Shippuden: Battleground!
programme.desc: As Darui and his First Company engage an army of White Zetsu, the remaining forces must deal with reanimated shinobi comprised of their late friends, and their worst enemies.

programme.title: Mobile Suit Gundam: The Origin - Advent of the Red Comet: Char, The Red Comet
programme.desc: Char becomes a hero of Zeon thanks to his exploits in the Battle of Loum, earning a promotion to Lieutenant Commander and the nickname 'Red Comet.'

programme.title: Lupin the Third Part 5: Her Relationship with Lupin
programme.desc: Lupin is pierced by Dolma's arrow. Ami and Fujiko take Lupin and escape, hiding in a deserted building. The three of them decide to flee, with Lupin badly injured.

programme.title: My Hero Academia: Special Episode: Save the World With Love!
programme.desc: After Izuku Midoriya is bestowed with a 'quirk,' he enrolls in a super hero high school.

programme.title: Superjail: Cold-blooded
programme.desc: The outside looks like a volcano, but the inside is a psychedelic alternate universe.

programme.title: Apollo Gauntlet: Demon
programme.desc: Apollo and his hero friends go on a camping vacation to relax, but end up stumbling upon the nefarious rituals of an evil cult.

programme.title: Aqua Teen Hunger Force: Revenge of the Mooninites
programme.desc: The Mooninites return with a belt that grants them the abilities of a 70's super group.

programme.title: Aqua Teen Hunger Force: MC Pee Pants
programme.desc: Meatwad and Carl become addicted to rap music and candy.

programme.title: Home Movies: Everyone's Entitled to My Opinion
programme.desc: Jason and Melissa are excited when Brendon begins writing reviews for a movie Web site.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Dreams/ Grandma Voice
programme.desc: After an exciting night of crime fighting, the Titans go to sleep and each one has unique dreams.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Operation Dude Rescue: Part 1
programme.desc: When the male Titans are captured, it's up to Starfire and Raven to rescue them but they're going to need some extra girl power.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Operation Dude Rescue: Part 2
programme.desc: The funny business that happens in between saving the world and being teenagers.

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet: A Devil on Your Shoulder/ Vestral Visions
programme.desc: Magnus gains new strength and insight on the AO’s mission to find Core Cells that will eventually lead him down a dark hole. Then, Drago’s sickness leads Dan to a revelation that there is an ailing Core Cell.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Real Magic/ Puppets, Whaaaaat?

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: History Lesson

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Art of Ninjutsu

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Mr. Butt/ Man Person
programme.desc: Blackfire pays a surprise visit to her sister Starfire, and the Titans suspect her motive; Beast Boy is distressed by his big new battle scar but Cyborg says it makes him tougher.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Think About Your Future

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Booty Scooty
programme.desc: The Titans are reckless with their money and health, much to the detriment of their future selves.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Pirates/ I See You

programme.title: Mao Mao: Heroes of Pure Heart: Small

programme.title: Mao Mao: Heroes of Pure Heart: Legend of Torbaclaun

programme.title: Mao Mao: Heroes of Pure Heart: Meet Tanya Keys

programme.title: Mao Mao: Heroes of Pure Heart: Weapon of Choice
programme.desc: An explosive loner and his slacker best friend are waylaid from a journey into legends.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Who's Laughing Now

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Oregon Trail

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Brian
programme.desc: The funny business that happens in between saving the world and being teenagers.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Nature
programme.desc: When Beast Boy loses his ability to change into animals, he realizes that he's lost touch with his wild side. He goes to the forest to reconnect with his inner beast, but Mother Nature isn't as great as he had hoped.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Snuggle Time
programme.desc: When yet another crime alert interrupts their relaxation, the Titans decide to become villains and do whatever they want.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Oh Yeah!
programme.desc: Cyborg tells the other Titans that pro wrestling on TV is fake and tries to teach them about real wrestling.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Salty Codgers
programme.desc: Mad Mod steals the youth from Cyborg, Beast Boy, Starfire and Robin, turning them into Raven's favorite type of people: salty codgers. Instead of helping the Titans get their youth back, Raven teaches them how cool old people are.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Knowledge

programme.title: Won't You Be My Neighbor?
programme.desc: Examine the life and legacy of Fred Rogers, the beloved host of the popular children's TV show 'Mister Rogers' Neighborhood.'

programme.desc: Themes of power and politics play out within a rich and dysfunctional family.

programme.desc: Simon and Mike disagree on their theories about the case; Hussein and Suha search for their son.

programme.title: Our Boys: Chapter 3: Two Packs of Red Next

programme.title: Room 104: Animal for Sale
programme.desc: Room 104 tells a different story about the characters who stay in this hotel room.

programme.desc: After a year of dating, an American woman accompanies her boyfriend to Asia to attend his cousin's wedding, and discovers that his family is incredibly rich. She finds it difficult to be accepted, especially by his domineering and controlling mother.

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
programme.desc: The outspoken comedian discusses hot topics.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
programme.desc: Comedian John Oliver offers his satirical take on news, current events and politics.

programme.title: Movie: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A new student is a hit with the popular crowd until she falls for the wrong guy.

programme.title: Movie: Big Trouble in Little China
programme.desc: A trucker helps his friend rescue his fiancée from an ancient Chinese sorcerer, who must wed her to be freed from his prison.

programme.title: Movie: Going the Distance
programme.desc: A couple tries to keep their relationship going as they travel between New York and San Francisco to see each other.

programme.title: Movie: Search Party
programme.desc: Hijinks and misadventures abound when a young man's two best friends step up to rescue him after a carjacking and reunite him with his wayward bride-to-be.

programme.title: Movie: Hulk
programme.desc: A geneticist's experimental accident curses him with the tendency to become a powerful giant green brute under emotional stress.

programme.title: Movie: Rescue Dawn
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Dieter Dengler. An American fighter pilot leads a group of POWs in a courageous escape from a Vietnamese POW camp.

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
programme.desc: The outspoken comedian discusses hot topics.

programme.title: Movie: The Mule
programme.desc: An old man who's broke and estranged from his family becomes a drug mule for a Mexican cartel in an attempt to make ends meet, but when his past mistakes start to weigh on his heart he tries to make things right before the DEA catches up with him.

programme.title: Succession: The Summer Palace
programme.desc: Kendall tries to make amends with his dad and Logan receives stark advice from his banker.

programme.title: Succession: Vaulter
programme.desc: Shiv weighs her options between Waystar Royco and Gil’s campaign, while Roman and Kendall disagree on how to proceed with uncooperative new media company Vaulter.

programme.title: Shameless: Hurricane Monica
programme.desc: Monica's back, cooking, partying and scamming with Frank just like old times.

programme.title: Shameless: A Great Cause
programme.desc: Having Monica around to help out opens Fiona up to a world of possibilities.

programme.title: Shameless: Just Like the Pilgrims Intended
programme.desc: Steve stands up to Fiona; Debbie worries depression is genetic; Frank thinks Monica should be on meds.

programme.title: Shameless: Fiona Interrupted
programme.desc: Jimmy finally agrees to let Fiona meet his family. Sheila and Jody conspire to harbour Karen's fugitive baby.

programme.title: On Becoming a God in Central Florida: The Stinker Thinker
programme.desc: Krystal Stubbs doubles down on her husband's dreams while he wrestles with leaving his job. Cody loses a friend, but meets his hero.

programme.title: On Becoming a God in Central Florida: The Gloomy-Zoomies
programme.desc: Krystal networks her way into an opportunity in the beauty pageant industry. Meanwhile, Cody tries to be his own workhorse and Ernie builds a time capsule.

programme.title: Murder in the Bayou: Chapter Two: Death on Me
programme.desc: The body count in Jennings continues to grow, with four more victims discovered over the next year. Police state that the women lived 'high risk lifestyles', and all were known by one of the original suspects, Frankie Richard.

programme.title: Movie: Rust Creek
programme.desc: An overachiever gets lost on her way to a job interview, and a wrong turn leaves her stranded.

programme.title: On Becoming a God in Central Florida: Many Masters
programme.desc: Obie and Louise Garbeau host a lavish motivational retreat at Paradise Cay for Washington-level entrepreneurs.

programme.title: The Affair
programme.desc: Noah, Margaret and Stacey bond over their mutual distaste for Sasha. Noah attempts to sabotage Helen and Sasha's relationship. Whitney and Colin face the hardships of their relationship. Joanie visits the graveyard.

programme.title: Couples Therapy
programme.desc: A recent fight between Lauren and Sarah reveals underlying power dynamics. Orna pushes Mau and struggles with her inability to break through. DeSean is sick of failing to make Elaine happy.

programme.title: Movie: Molly's Game
programme.desc: A former athlete who didn't make the Olympic team due to an injury gets swept up into the world of high-stakes underground gambling. It doesn't take long before she's running an illegal poker empire for Hollywood celebrities and business tycoons.

programme.title: Movie: Wayne's World
programme.desc: A sleazy network executive pursues two zany teenagers with their own TV show.

programme.title: Inside the NFL: 2019: Week 2
programme.desc: Sports Illustrated reporter Robert Klemko joins host James Brown to discuss his recent article about New England Patriots wide receiver Antonio Brown and Brown's alleged misconduct. There is also a discussion about young quarterbacks in the NFL.

programme.title: Movie: Tombstone
programme.desc: Wyatt Earp comes out of retirement and forms a group to fight a gang of unruly outlaws.

programme.title: Movie: Confessions of a Dangerous Mind
programme.desc: Based on the true story about Chuck Barris, a popular game show host in the 60s and 70s who also claims to have been a CIA hit man.

programme.title: Movie: Total Recall
programme.desc: A man tries to piece together his identity after learning that his memories are false. He travels to Mars and becomes involved in a revolution to overthrow the corrupt Governor of the planet and liberate an alien artifact.

programme.title: Movie: Hustle and Flow
programme.desc: An aging pimp from Memphis named DJay has aspirations of becoming a successful rapper. When he learns that a famous rap star is coming to his area, DJay attempts to grab his attention and fulfil his dream.

programme.title: Movie: Miss Bala
programme.desc: Gloria becomes involved in the dangerous world of cross-border crime. In order to survive, she finds a power she never knew she had. Relying on all of the cunning and strength she can muster, she fights her way out.

programme.title: Power: Why Is Tommy Still Alive?
programme.desc: A visionary crime-drama set in two different worlds; a club scene and drug trade.

programme.title: Movie: Role Models

programme.title: Power: Why Is Tommy Still Alive?

programme.title: Movie: The Big Lebowski
programme.desc: After having his rug soiled during a case of mistaken identity, Jeff Lebowski, preferably known as The Dude, seeks reimbursement. Before long, The Dude and his buddies are caught up in a deadly kidnapping during a weekend of bowling and pie stick rituals.

programme.title: Movie: Back to the Future
programme.desc: A teenager roars back through time to 1955, where he meets his parents at a young age.

programme.title: Movie: Heartbreakers
programme.desc: A mother and daughter team up to con rich men into marriage and rob them of their fortunes.

programme.title: Movie: The Day the Earth Stood Still
programme.desc: An advanced life form comes to the Earth to save the planet and the creatures that live there. Human beings are deemed to be the cause of the planet's suffering and are to be eliminated. The life form learns the people are not as evil as they seem.

programme.title: Movie: Back to the Future III
programme.desc: A time traveller ventures to 1885 to prevent his friend's murder and preserve the future.

programme.desc: Two parents try to hide their mounting financial difficulties from their college-age daughter and their social circle through increasingly convoluted schemes.

programme.desc: A young woman witnessed her parents' deaths during her childhood in Bogotá. She has now become an assassin. She works for her uncle as a hit man, but during her own time, she is trying to avenge her parents' deaths by finding the mobster that killed them.

programme.title: Movie: The Equalizer 2

programme.desc: After stumbling upon a suspicious drowning while hiking, a reporter learns she has a knack for solving crime.

programme.desc: A murder takes place during a political fundraiser for Jessica's old friend.
